# Hermes Market Swing MCP к°ңл°ң кі„нҡҚм„ң

## 1. к°ңмҡ”

мқҙ л¬ём„ңлҠ” Hermes Agentм—җ м—°кІ°н•  `Market Swing MCP Server`мқҳ к°ңл°ң кі„нҡҚм„ңлӢӨ. лӘ©н‘ңлҠ” BTCмҷҖ лҜёкөӯ м§ҖмҲҳ 2~3л°° лЎұ ETFлҘј лҢҖмғҒмңјлЎң, мҠӨмңҷ кҙҖм җм—җм„ң л§ӨмҲҳ к°ҖлҠҘ м—¬л¶Җ, 2л°°/3л°° м„ нғқ, мҶҗм Ҳ мЎ°кұҙ, мқөм Ҳ мЎ°кұҙ, ліҙмң  нҸ¬м§Җм…ҳ кҙҖлҰ¬ к°Җмқҙл“ңлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҳлҠ” к°ңмқёмҡ© мӢңмһҘ нҢҗлӢЁ мӢңмҠӨн…ңмқ„ л§Ңл“ңлҠ” кІғмқҙлӢӨ.

мҙҲкё° лӘ©н‘ңлҠ” мһҗлҸҷ мЈјл¬ёмқҙ м•„лӢҲлӢӨ. лЁјм Җ лҚ°мқҙн„° мҲҳм§‘, м§Җн‘ң кі„мӮ°, лүҙмҠӨ/л§ӨнҒ¬лЎң н•ҙм„қ, мӢ нҳё кё°лЎқ, мӮ¬нӣ„ нҸүк°Җ, н…”л Ҳк·ёлһЁ лҰ¬нҸ¬нҠёк№Ңм§Җ кө¬нҳ„н•ңлӢӨ. мЈјл¬ё м—°лҸҷмқҖ л§Ҳм§Җл§ү лӢЁкі„мқҳ м„ нғқ мӮ¬н•ӯмқҙл©°, кё°ліёк°’мқҖ мҠ№мқё кё°л°ҳ мҲҳлҸҷ мӢӨн–үмңјлЎң л‘”лӢӨ.

мЈјмҡ” лҢҖмғҒ мғҒн’ҲмқҖ лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷлӢӨ.

| кө¬л¶„ | мӢӨм ң л§ӨмҲҳ нӣ„ліҙ | нҢҗлӢЁ кё°мӨҖ |
| --- | --- | --- |
| лӮҳмҠӨлӢҘ100 | QLD, TQQQ | QQQ, NDX, NQ futures |
| S&P500 | SSO, UPRO | SPY, SPX, ES futures |
| л°ҳлҸ„мІҙ | SOXL | SMH, SOXX, SOX, NVDA, AVGO, AMD |
| BTC | BTC coin-m long | BTC spot/futures, funding, OI |

мөңмў… м¶ңл ҘмқҖ лӢӨмқҢ м•Ўм…ҳ мӨ‘ н•ҳлӮҳлӢӨ.

```text
BUY_3X       к°•н•ң мғҒмҠ№ мҠӨмңҷ м§„мһ… к°ҖлҠҘ
BUY_2X       мғҒмҠ№ мҠӨмңҷ к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳм§Җл§Ң ліҖлҸҷм„ұ/мқҙлІӨнҠё лҰ¬мҠӨнҒ¬ мЎҙмһ¬
BUY_WATCH    л§ӨмҲҳ нӣ„ліҙмқҙлӮҳ нҷ•мқё н•„мҡ”
WAIT         кҙҖл§қ
TRIM         мқјл¶Җ мқөм Ҳ лҳҗлҠ” лҰ¬мҠӨнҒ¬ м¶•мҶҢ
EXIT         м „лҹү мІӯмӮ° к¶Ңкі 
STOP         м§„мһ… л…јлҰ¬ л¬ҙнҡЁнҷ”
BLOCK        мӢ к·ң лЎұ кёҲм§Җ
```

## 4.516 P1 Repository SQLite Latest Report Filtered Source Selected Degradation Field Target Order Gate Record - 2026-05-24

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

4.515м—җм„ң SQLite repository-backed filtered latest reportмқҳ degradation Hermes boundary target orderлҘј кі м •н–ҲлӢӨ.
мқҙлІҲ sliceлҠ” repository selection мқҙнӣ„ selected degradation field targetмқҙ latest signal report degradation field мҲңм„ңлҘј
timeframe/underlying н•„н„° кІҪлЎңм—җм„ң м§Ғм ‘ ліҙмЎҙн•ҳлҠ”м§Җ кі м •н•ңлӢӨ.

### B. кө¬нҳ„ кі„нҡҚ

```text
status: verified
implemented:
  - assert timeframe-filtered selected degradation field target order after repository selection
  - assert underlying-filtered selected degradation field target order after repository selection
  - keep selected degradation field checks limited to repository-selected latest signal report degradation fields
```

### C. кІҪкі„ мЎ°кұҙ

```text
not_allowed:
  - schema migration or DDL change
  - automatic HALO_SWING_DATABASE_URL activation
  - repo data/state/artifact SQLite files
  - live_adapters path
  - broker/order expansion
  - Telegram send call
  - Hermes runtime call
  - scheduler or cron execution
  - secret value output
```

### D. кІҖмҰқ кі„нҡҚ

```text
status: passed
commands:
  - diff -u .codex/tasks/current.json docs/codex-task.json
  - PYTHONPATH=src ./.venv/bin/python -m json.tool .codex/tasks/current.json
  - PYTHONPATH=src ./.venv/bin/python -m json.tool docs/codex-task.json
  - git diff --check
  - git status --short --branch
  - PYTHONPATH=src ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_reporting.py::test_latest_signal_report_repository_source_filters_by_timeframe tests/test_reporting.py::test_latest_signal_report_repository_source_filters_by_underlying tests/test_reporting.py::test_latest_signal_report_contains_required_report_sections -q
  - PYTHONPATH=src ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest
  - PYTHONPATH=src ./.venv/bin/python -m ruff check .
  - PYTHONPATH=src ./.venv/bin/python -m halo_swing_mcp.harness health_check
results:
  - task mirror diff passed
  - current task JSON parsed
  - docs task JSON parsed
  - git diff --check passed
  - git status showed expected modified task/docs/test files only
  - focused pytest passed: 3 passed in 1.24s
  - full pytest passed: 935 passed in 40.98s
  - ruff passed
  - health_check passed with status ok
```

л¬ҙмӢңн•ҳкі  setupмқ„ blockedлЎң мң м§Җн•Ёмқ„ кі м •н–ҲлӢӨ. мқҙлІҲ sliceлҠ” disable н”Ңлһҳк·ёк°Җ `.env` нҢҢмқј
мһҗмІҙм—җ л“Өм–ҙ мһҲмқ„ л•ҢлҸ„ к°ҷмқҖ нҢҢмқјмқҳ мӢӨм ң credentialsк°Җ лЎңл“ңлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”м§Җ кі м •н•ңлӢӨ. мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗк°Җ
`.env`м—җм„ң dotenv loadingмқ„ лҒ„л©ҙ, к·ё нҢҢмқјм—җ мӢӨмҲҳлЎң мӢӨм ң нӮӨк°Җ к°ҷмқҙ лӮЁм•„ мһҲм–ҙлҸ„ CLIк°Җ к·ё нӮӨлҘј

```text

implemented:
  - add summary-only pipeline CLI regression with HALO_SWING_DISABLE_DOTENV=true and real credentials in the same launch-directory dotenv
```

operatorлҠ” м•„м§Ғ `auto_selects_live_provider`, optional `*_DATA_MODE` env, к·ёлҰ¬кі 
`live_mode_required` мғҒнғңлҘј nested `api_key_provider_selection_summary` лҳҗлҠ”
`get_live_data_api_key_status.providers`м—җм„ң лӢӨмӢң нҷ•мқён•ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ. мқҙлІҲ sliceлҠ” API нӮӨл§Ң
мұ„мҡ°л©ҙ лі„лҸ„ live-mode env м—Ҷмқҙ providerк°Җ liveлЎң мһҗлҸҷ м„ нғқлҗңлӢӨлҠ” мӮ¬мӢӨмқ„ no-secret
top-level mirrorsлЎң мҳ¬л Ө мӢӨм ң м—°лҸҷ handoffлҘј лҚ” м§Ғм ‘нҷ”н•ңлӢӨ.

л„ЈмқҖ л’Ө н•ң лІҲмқҳ compact CLI/MCP мқ‘лӢөм—җм„ң л°”лЎң лӢӨмқҢ local commandлҘј м°ҫкё° м–ҙл өлӢӨ. мқҙлІҲ
sliceлҠ” summary-only outputм—җлҸ„ no-secret `next_operator_action`мқ„ мң м§Җн•ҳкі ,
`readiness_summary.next_operator_action`кіј лҸҷмқјн•ң action evidenceлҘј м ңкіөн•ҳлҸ„лЎқ кі м •н•ңлӢӨ.

## 3.735 API Key Live HTTP Timeout Gate Record - 2026-05-17

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

API-key-backed provider smokeлҠ” мӢӨм ң Polygon/FRED/NewsAPI л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬лҘј нҳём¶ңн•ңлӢӨ.
кё°ліё HTTP timeoutмқҖ 10мҙҲлЎң мһЎнҳҖ мһҲм§Җл§Ң мҡҙмҳҒ нҷҳкІҪмқҙ лҠҗлҰ¬кұ°лӮҳ л№ лҘё мӢӨнҢЁк°Җ н•„мҡ”н•ң
кІҪмҡ° `.env`м—җм„ң мЎ°м •н•  мҲҳ м—ҶлӢӨ. мқҙлІҲ sliceлҠ”
`HALO_SWING_LIVE_HTTP_TIMEOUT_SECONDS`лҘј м„Өм •к°’мңјлЎң л…ём¶ңн•ҙ API нӮӨл§Ң л„ЈмқҖ live
smokeк°Җ нҷҳкІҪм—җ л§һлҠ” timeout м•Ҳм—җм„ң мӢӨнҢЁн•ҳкұ°лӮҳ provider recovery кІҪлЎңлЎң лҸҢм•„мҳӨкІҢ
н•ңлӢӨ.

## 3.730 API Key Dotenv Loading Summary Gate Record - 2026-05-17

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

`get_integration_setup_checklist`лҘј MCP/server/CLI harnessм—җ л“ұлЎқн•ҙ readiness

## 2. мӢңмҠӨн…ң м •мқҳ

### 2.1 мӢңмҠӨн…ңмқҳ м—ӯн• 

мқҙ мӢңмҠӨн…ңмқҖ Hermes Agentмқҳ MCP лҸ„кө¬ м„ңлІ„лЎң лҸҷмһ‘н•ңлӢӨ. HermesлҠ” лҢҖнҷ”, н…”л Ҳк·ёлһЁ, нҒ¬лЎ , л©”лӘЁлҰ¬, л©ҖнӢ°лӘЁлӢ¬ нҢҗлӢЁ, мөңмў… м„ӨлӘ… мғқм„ұмқ„ лӢҙлӢ№н•ңлӢӨ. MCP м„ңлІ„лҠ” лҚ°мқҙн„° мҲҳм§‘, м§Җн‘ң кі„мӮ°, мҠӨмҪ”м–ҙл§Ғ, лқјлІЁл§Ғ, л°ұн…ҢмҠӨнҠё, н”јл“ңл°ұ кі„мӮ°мқ„ лӢҙлӢ№н•ңлӢӨ.

```text
Hermes Agent:
- Codex OAuth лҳҗлҠ” лӢӨлҘё LLM provider мӮ¬мҡ©
- н…”л Ҳк·ёлһЁ/CLIм—җм„ң м§Ҳл¬ё мҲҳмӢ 
- нҒ¬лЎ мңјлЎң м •кё° лҰ¬нҸ¬нҠё мӢӨн–ү
- MCP лҸ„кө¬ нҳём¶ң
- мөңмў… м„ӨлӘ…кіј нҢҗлӢЁ мҡ”м•Ҫ мғқм„ұ

Market Swing MCP Server:
- к°ҖкІ©/л§ӨнҒ¬лЎң/лүҙмҠӨ/мқҙлІӨнҠё лҚ°мқҙн„° мҲҳм§‘
- м§Җн‘ң кі„мӮ°
- мҠӨмңҷ мӢ нҳё кі„мӮ°
- л§ӨмҲҳ/мҶҗм Ҳ/мқөм Ҳ к°Җмқҙл“ң мғқм„ұ
- мӢ нҳё кё°лЎқ
- кІ°кіј лқјлІЁл§Ғ
- мҠӨмҪ”м–ҙл§Ғ м„ұлҠҘ нҸүк°Җ
- к°ңм„  нӣ„ліҙ м ңм•Ҳ
```

### 2.2 н•өмӢ¬ мӣҗм№ҷ

1. мҲ«мһҗ кі„мӮ°мқҖ мҪ”л“ңк°Җ н•ңлӢӨ.
2. LLMмқҖ мһҗлЈҢ н•ҙм„қ, м¶©лҸҢ нҢҗлӢЁ, м„ӨлӘ… мғқм„ұм—җ м“ҙлӢӨ.
3. л ҲлІ„лҰ¬м§Җ ETFлҠ” мһҘкё° ліҙмң  мһҗмӮ°мқҙ м•„лӢҲлқј мҠӨмңҷ м „мҲ  мһҗмӮ°мңјлЎң ліёлӢӨ.
4. л ҲлІ„лҰ¬м§Җ ETF нҢҗлӢЁмқҖ ETF мһҗмІҙліҙлӢӨ кё°мҙҲм§ҖмҲҳ кё°мӨҖмңјлЎң н•ңлӢӨ.
5. мӢ нҳёлҠ” л°ҳл“ңмӢң кё°лЎқн•ҳкі , мқјм • мӢңк°„мқҙ м§ҖлӮң л’Ө мӢӨм ң кІ°кіјлЎң мұ„м җн•ңлӢӨ.
6. мҠӨмҪ”м–ҙл§Ғ ліҖкІҪмқҖ мҰүмӢң мӢӨм „ л°ҳмҳҒн•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡкі  Champion/Challenger л°©мӢқмңјлЎң кІҖмҰқн•ңлӢӨ.
7. мһҗлҸҷ мЈјл¬ёмқҖ MVP лІ”мң„м—җм„ң м ңмҷён•ңлӢӨ.
8. мғҲ кё°лҠҘмқҖ лӢЁлҸ… мӢӨн–ү к°ҖлҠҘн•ң н•ҳл„ӨмҠӨмҷҖ fixtureлҘј мҡ°м„  м„Өкі„н•ңлӢӨ.

### 2.2.1 н•ҳл„ӨмҠӨ м—”м§ҖлӢҲм–ҙл§Ғ мӣҗм№ҷ

Halo SwingмқҖ мҷёл¶Җ лҚ°мқҙн„°, LLM н•ҙм„қ, м§Җн‘ң кі„мӮ°, мҠӨмҪ”м–ҙл§Ғмқҙ кІ°н•©лҗҳлҠ” мӢңмҠӨн…ңмқҙлӢӨ. л”°лқјм„ң кё°лҠҘмқ„ л°”лЎң нҒ° м—җмқҙм „нҠё нқҗлҰ„м—җ л¶ҷмқҙм§Җ м•Ҡкі , к°Ғ лӘЁл“Ҳмқ„ мһ‘кі  мһ¬нҳ„ к°ҖлҠҘн•ң мӢӨн–ү н•ҳл„ӨмҠӨлЎң к°җмӢјлӢӨ.

```text
лӘ©н‘ң:
- лӢӨмқҢ LLM/Codex м„ём…ҳмқҙ м•Ҳм „н•ҳкІҢ мҲҳм •н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” мһ‘м—… л°ңнҢҗ м ңкіө
- live API м—ҶмқҙлҸ„ мЈјмҡ” нҢҗлӢЁ лЎңм§Ғ мһ¬нҳ„
- мҠӨмҪ”м–ҙл§Ғ ліҖкІҪ м „нӣ„ кІ°кіј л№„көҗ
- LLM prompt/output ліҖкІҪмқҳ нҡҢк·Җ нғҗм§Җ
```

н•„мҲҳ н•ҳл„ӨмҠӨ:

```text
1. tool harness
   - к°Ғ MCP toolмқ„ Hermes м—Ҷмқҙ м§Ғм ‘ мӢӨн–ү
   - мһ…л Ҙ JSON fixture -> м¶ңл Ҙ JSON golden л№„көҗ

2. data harness
   - market/news/macro мҲҳм§‘кё°лҘј live/replay лӘЁл“ңлЎң л¶„лҰ¬
   - мҷёл¶Җ API мһҘм•  мӢң fixtureлЎң н…ҢмҠӨнҠё к°ҖлҠҘ

3. indicator harness
   - OHLCV fixture -> RSI/DMI/ADX/MA/ATR expected output

4. scoring harness
   - feature fixture -> score/action/stop/take-profit expected output

5. labeling harness
   - price path fixture -> triple barrier outcome/MFE/MAE expected output

6. report harness
   - MCP structured output -> Hermes-facing report snapshot
```

мӣҗм№ҷ:

```text
- live API н…ҢмҠӨнҠёлҠ” smokeлЎңл§Ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ңлӢӨ.
- н•өмӢ¬ лЎңм§Ғ кІҖмҰқмқҖ deterministic fixtureлҘј мҡ°м„ н•ңлӢӨ.
- LLM м¶ңл ҘмқҖ к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳл©ҙ schemaлЎң кі м •н•ҳкі  snapshot/golden testлҘј л‘”лӢӨ.
- н•ҳл„ӨмҠӨк°Җ м—ҶлҠ” кё°лҠҘмқҖ мҷ„лЈҢлЎң ліҙм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.
```

### 2.2.2 к°ҖмғҒ к°ңл°ңнҢҖ кІҢмқҙнҠё

Codex нҷҳкІҪм—җм„ң м§ҖмҶҚнҳ• л©ҖнӢ°м—җмқҙм „нҠё нҢҖмқҙ н•ӯмғҒ м ңкіөлҗңлӢӨкі  к°Җм •н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ. лҢҖмӢ  к°Ғ мһ‘м—…мқҖ м•„лһҳ м—ӯн•  кҙҖм җмқҳ мӮ°м¶ңл¬јкіј мІҙнҒ¬лҘј лӮЁкёҙлӢӨ.

```text
Dev:
- кё°лҠҘ кө¬нҳ„
- мөңмҶҢ мӢӨн–ү н•ҳл„ӨмҠӨ
- лӢЁмң„ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё лҳҗлҠ” smoke command

DevOps:
- лЎңм»¬ к°ңл°ң нҷҳкІҪкіј мқҳмЎҙм„ұ кҙҖлҰ¬
- MCP м„ңлІ„ мӢӨн–ү лӘ…л №кіј smoke command кҙҖлҰ¬
- Hermes MCP config мҳҲмӢңмҷҖ мҡҙмҳҒ к°Җмқҙл“ң кҙҖлҰ¬
- secrets/.env м·Ёкёү мӣҗм№ҷ нҷ•мқё

QC:
- fixture/golden test
- replay/live smoke л¶„лҰ¬
- нҡҢк·Җ к°ҖлҠҘм„ұ кё°лЎқ

CTO:
- м•„нӮӨн…ҚмІҳ мқјкҙҖм„ұ
- кіјмөңм Ғнҷ”/лҚ°мқҙн„° лҲ„мҲҳ/лҰ¬мҠӨнҒ¬ мҳҲмӮ° кІҖнҶ 
- MVP лІ”мң„мҷҖ мһҗлҸҷмЈјл¬ё кёҲм§Җм„  нҷ•мқё

Docs Gardener:
- SSOT ліҖкІҪ м—¬л¶Җ нҷ•мқё
- CONTEXT/WORKING к°ұмӢ 
- мӨ‘ліө л¬ём„ңмҷҖ мҳӨлһҳлҗң л§ҒнҒ¬ м ңкұ°
```

мҷ„лЈҢ м •мқҳ:

```text
мһ‘м—… мҷ„лЈҢ = мҪ”л“ңк°Җ лҸҢм•„к°җ + DevOps мӢӨн–ү кІҪлЎңк°Җ мһҲмқҢ + н•ҳл„ӨмҠӨк°Җ мһҲмқҢ + QC мһ¬нҳ„ к°ҖлҠҘ + CTO кҙҖм җ лҰ¬мҠӨнҒ¬ нҷ•мқё + л¬ём„ң мғҒнғң мөңмӢ 
```

### 2.3 мЈјмҡ” м§Ҳл¬ё

мӢңмҠӨн…ңмқҖ л§ӨлІҲ лӢӨмқҢ м§Ҳл¬ём—җ лӢөн•ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ.

```text

4. мқөм Ҳ лҳҗлҠ” мқјл¶Җ мІӯмӮ° мЎ°кұҙмқҖ л¬ҙм—Үмқёк°Җ?

6. мқҙлІҲ нҢҗлӢЁмқҳ мӢ лў°лҸ„мҷҖ м•Ҫм җмқҖ л¬ҙм—Үмқёк°Җ?
7. кіјкұ° л№„мҠ·н•ң мӢ нҳёлҠ” мӢӨм ңлЎң м–ҙл–»кІҢ лҗҗлҠ”к°Җ?
```

## 3. м•„нӮӨн…ҚмІҳ

### 3.1 м „мІҙ кө¬мЎ°

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    U["User / Telegram / CLI"] --> H["Hermes Agent"]

    M --> D["Data Collectors"]

    D --> DB[("SQLite/PostgreSQL")]

    S --> DB
    R --> DB
    L --> DB
    E --> DB
    CFG --> DB
    W --> DB

    M --> H
```


### 3.3 MCP лҸ„кө¬ лӘ©лЎқ

| лҸ„кө¬ | м—ӯн•  |
| --- | --- |
| `get_market_snapshot` | QQQ, SPY, SMH, SOXX, BTC л“ұ к°ҖкІ©/м¶”м„ё мҡ”м•Ҫ |
| `get_macro_snapshot` | VIX, VXN, DXY, кёҲлҰ¬, мң к°Җ, кёҲ л“ұ л§ӨнҒ¬лЎң мғҒнғң |
| `get_event_calendar` | FOMC, CPI, PCE, NFP, мӢӨм Ғ, көӯмұ„мһ…м°° мқјм • |
| `get_news_bundle` | Fed, Treasury, White House, EIA, Iran, AI/л°ҳлҸ„мІҙ лүҙмҠӨ мҲҳм§‘ |
| `calculate_indicators` | RSI, DMI/ADX, MA, ATR, gap, support/resistance кі„мӮ° |
| `render_chart` | кё°мҙҲмһҗмӮ° м°ЁнҠё PNG мғқм„ұ |
| `score_leverage_swing` | 2л°°/3л°° лЎұ ETF л§ӨмҲҳ к°ҖлҠҘм„ұ м җмҲҳнҷ” |
| `generate_trade_guide` | м§„мһ…/мҶҗм Ҳ/мқөм Ҳ/мӢңк°„мҶҗм Ҳ к°Җмқҙл“ң мғқм„ұ |
| `evaluate_position` | ліҙмң  нҸ¬м§Җм…ҳмқҳ мң м§Җ/м¶•мҶҢ/мІӯмӮ° нҢҗлӢЁ |
| `record_signal` | мғқм„ұлҗң мӢ нҳёлҘј ledgerм—җ м ҖмһҘ |
| `label_signal_outcome` | мӢ нҳё л°ңмғқ нӣ„ кІ°кіј лқјлІЁл§Ғ |
| `evaluate_score_performance` | мҠӨмҪ”м–ҙл§Ғ м„ұлҠҘ лҰ¬нҸ¬нҠё |
| `suggest_weight_update` | к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ/мһ„кі„к°’ к°ңм„  нӣ„ліҙ м ңм•Ҳ |
| `compare_champion_challenger` | нҳ„н–ү лӘЁлҚёкіј нӣ„ліҙ лӘЁлҚё л№„көҗ |

### 3.3.1 м„Өм •, мғҒнғң, к°җмӢң мӣҗм№ҷ

мҠӨмҪ”м–ҙл§Ғ к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳмҷҖ мһ„кі„к°’мқҖ мҪ”л“ңм—җ н•ҳл“ңмҪ”л”©н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ. мҙҲкё°м—җлҠ” JSON нҢҢмқјлЎң мӢңмһ‘н•ҳкі , мҡҙмҳҒ мқҙл Ҙмқҙ мҢ“мқҙл©ҙ DBмқҳ `strategy_config`/`model_registry`мҷҖ м—°кІ°н•ңлӢӨ.

```text
мӣҗм№ҷ:
- лӘЁл“  мӢ нҳёлҠ” config_versionкіј config_hashлҘј к°Җм§„лӢӨ.
- feedback pipelineмқҖ active м„Өм •мқ„ м§Ғм ‘ лҚ®м–ҙм“°м§Җ м•Ҡкі  candidate/challengerл§Ң л§Ңл“ лӢӨ.
- active м„Өм • ліҖкІҪмқҖ лӘ…мӢңм Ғ мҠ№мқё лҳҗлҠ” лі„лҸ„ promotion м Ҳм°ЁлҘј кұ°м№ңлӢӨ.
- JSON м„Өм •мқҖ schema validation, bounds check, sum checkлҘј нҶөкіјн•ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ.
- лҹ°нғҖмһ„ checkpointмҷҖ мһ¬нҳ„мҡ© мһ…л Ҙ snapshotмқҖ л¶„лҰ¬н•ҙм„ң м ҖмһҘн•ңлӢӨ.
- л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ лҚӨн”„, logs, checkpoint, runtime artifactлҠ” gitм—җ м»Өл°Ӣн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.
```

мҙҲкё° JSON м„Өм • мҳҲмӢң:

```json
{
  "config_id": "leverage_swing_default",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "status": "champion",
  "target_universe": ["TQQQ", "QLD", "UPRO", "SSO", "SOXL", "BTC"],
  "weights": {
    "trend": 0.25,
    "momentum": 0.20,
    "volatility": 0.20,
    "macro": 0.15,
    "event_risk": 0.10,
    "theme": 0.10
  },
  "thresholds": {
    "buy_3x": 0.68,
    "buy_2x": 0.52,
    "block": 0.30
  },
  "risk": {
    "max_3x_event_risk": 0.35,
    "time_barrier_days": 10
  }
}
```

watchdogлҠ” мһҘкё° мӢӨн–ү м•Ҳм •м„ұмқ„ мң„н•ң лӮҙл¶Җ к°җмӢң л Ҳмқҙм–ҙлӢӨ.

```text
к°җмӢң лҢҖмғҒ:
- memory_rss_mb лҳҗлҠ” н”„лЎңм„ёмҠӨ л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ мӮ¬мҡ©лҹү
- run queue length / stale job
- л°ҳліө мҳҲмҷёмҷҖ мһ¬мӢңлҸ„ нҸӯмҰқ
- null/NaN/Inf л№„мңЁ мҰқк°Җ
- л№„м •мғҒм ҒмңјлЎң нҒ° evidence bundle лҳҗлҠ” feature payload
- config hash mismatch
- checkpoint м§Җм—° лҳҗлҠ” мӢӨнҢЁ

лҸҷмһ‘:
- warning event кё°лЎқ
- нҳ„мһ¬ run journalм—җ мғҒнғң м¶”к°Җ
- н•„мҡ” мӢң checkpoint м ҖмһҘ
- hard limit мҙҲкіј мӢң мӢ к·ң live мһ‘м—… м°ЁлӢЁ лҳҗлҠ” graceful shutdown мҡ”мІӯ
```

24/7 мҡҙмҳҒ м•Ҳм •м„ұмқҖ лӮҙл¶Җ watchdogмҷҖ мҷёл¶Җ supervisorлҘј н•Ёк»ҳ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ңлӢӨ. MCP м„ңлІ„лҠ” к°ҖлҠҘн•ң н•ң м–Үкі  мһ¬мӢңмһ‘ к°ҖлҠҘн•ң н”„лЎңм„ёмҠӨлЎң мң м§Җн•ҳкі , мһҘмӢңк°„ мһ‘м—…мқҖ run journal/checkpointлЎң ліөкө¬ к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳкІҢ л§Ңл“ лӢӨ.

```text
н•„мҲҳ мҡҙмҳҒ к°Җл“ңл Ҳмқј:
- process supervisor: launchd/systemd/Hermes runner л“ұм—җм„ң restart policyмҷҖ crash-loop backoff м„Өм •
- liveness/readiness: health_checkмҷҖ runtime statusлҘј л¶„лҰ¬
- memory budget: soft/hard RSS limit, cache TTL, max in-memory artifact size
- bounded queue: max queue length, stale job timeout, duplicate run lock
- timeout: live API, browser/news/PDF parsing, chart rendering, LLM call к°Ғк°Ғм—җ deadline м„Өм •
- retry policy: exponential backoff + jitter, max retry, providerлі„ rate limit
- circuit breaker: мҷёл¶Җ API мһҘм• /429/5xxк°Җ л°ҳліөлҗҳл©ҙ live callмқ„ мһ„мӢң м°ЁлӢЁн•ҳкі  replay/cacheлЎң degraded mode
- idempotency: cron/report/labeling jobмқҖ run_idмҷҖ idempotency keyлЎң мӨ‘ліө мӢӨн–ү л°©м§Җ
- atomic persistence: checkpointмҷҖ JSON configлҠ” temp file мһ‘м„ұ нӣ„ rename лҳҗлҠ” DB transaction мӮ¬мҡ©
- disk retention: logs/state/checkpoints/artifacts TTLкіј мөңлҢҖ мҡ©лҹү м ңн•ң
- alerting: critical watchdog_eventлҠ” Telegram лҳҗлҠ” мҡҙмҳҒ мұ„л„җлЎң м•ҢлҰј
- graceful degradation: лҚ°мқҙн„° мқјл¶Җ мһҘм•  мӢң BUY мӢ нҳёлҘј к°•м ңн•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡкі  WAIT/BLOCK лҳҗлҠ” stale-data warning м¶ңл Ҙ
```

л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ мҳӨлІ„н”ҢлЎңмҡ° л°©м§ҖлҘј мң„н•ң кё°ліё м„Өкі„:

```text
- лүҙмҠӨ/л¬ём„ң/м°ЁнҠё artifactлҠ” л©”лӘЁлҰ¬м—җ мҳӨлһҳ л“Өкі  мһҲм§Җ м•Ҡкі  file/ref кё°л°ҳмңјлЎң м „лӢ¬
- лҢҖнҳ• PDF/лүҙмҠӨ лІҲл“ӨмқҖ chunk лӢЁмң„ мІҳлҰ¬
- LLM/HermesлЎң л„ҳкё°лҠ” contextлҠ” evidence card summary мӨ‘мӢ¬мңјлЎң м ңн•ң
- cacheлҠ” LRU/TTLкіј max_items/max_bytesлҘј н•Ёк»ҳ л‘ 
- job мў…лЈҢ нӣ„ нҒ° к°қмІҙмҷҖ мһ„мӢң нҢҢмқјмқ„ лӘ…мӢңм ҒмңјлЎң м •лҰ¬
- watchdogк°Җ memory_rss_mb мҰқк°Җ м¶”м„ёлҘј к°җмӢңн•ҳкі  soft limitм—җм„ңлҠ” checkpoint, hard limitм—җм„ңлҠ” мӢ к·ң мһ‘м—… м°ЁлӢЁ
```

### 3.5 P1 Storage/Schema Decision Log

> мғҒнғң: CTO `DECISION_LOG_GO` recorded. P1 DTO/storage contract мһ‘м—…мқ„ мӢңмһ‘н•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ. Migration/repository мҪ”л“ңлҠ” к°Ғ н•ҳмң„ gate мҠ№мқё м „к№Ңм§Җ мһ‘м„ұн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.

P1мқҳ мІ« лӘ©н‘ңлҠ” мӢңмһҘ лҚ°мқҙн„° мҲҳм§‘мқҙ м•„лӢҲлқј, н–Ҙнӣ„ лӘЁл“  мӢ нҳёлҘј мһ¬нҳ„н•ҳкі  к°җмӮ¬н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” м ҖмһҘ кі„м•Ҫмқ„ лЁјм Җ нҷ•м •н•ҳлҠ” кІғмқҙлӢӨ. мҠӨнӮӨл§ҲлҠ” лҢҖмӢңліҙл“ң нҺёмқҳлҘј лЁјм Җ мөңм Ғнҷ”н•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡкі , лӢӨмқҢ л‘җ м§Ҳл¬ём—җ лӢөн•  мҲҳ мһҲм–ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ.

```text
1. нҠ№м • signal_id н•ҳлӮҳлҘј мһ…л Ҙн•ҳл©ҙ лӢ№мӢң нҢҗлӢЁмқ„ мҷ„м „нһҲ мһ¬нҳ„н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ”к°Җ?
2. мөңмӢ  actionable reportлҘј л§Ңл“Ө л•Ң н•„мҡ”н•ң н•өмӢ¬ н•„л“ңлҘј л№ лҘҙкІҢ мЎ°нҡҢн•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ”к°Җ?
```

#### 3.5.1 нҢҖлі„ sign-off matrix

| Gate | FE | DB | BE | QC | DevOps | Docs | CTO |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| decision_log | report/read model мҠ№мқё | table/index/constraint мҠ№мқё | DTO/repository boundary мҠ№мқё | acceptance criteria мҠ№мқё | path/artifact policy мҠ№мқё | SSOT мң„м№ҳ мҠ№мқё | мөңмў… go/no-go |
| dto_contract | report fields мҠ№мқё | column/ref mapping мҠ№мқё | DTO schema мҠ№мқё | golden fixture мҠ№мқё | no local path leak нҷ•мқё | fixture мң„м№ҳ нҷ•мқё | DTO_CONTRACT_GO |
| migration | no UI-only table нҷ•мқё | DDL/idempotency мҠ№мқё | migration runner мҠ№мқё | tmp_path test мҠ№мқё | no committed DB нҷ•мқё | README command кІҖмҰқ | MIGRATION_GO |
| repository | report read к°ҖлҠҘ нҷ•мқё | query/index нҷ•мқё | replay API мҠ№мқё | replay fixture мҠ№мқё | connection lifecycle нҷ•мқё | docs update нҷ•мқё | REPOSITORY_GO |
| docs_devops | report command л¬ёкө¬ нҷ•мқё | backup note нҷ•мқё | harness command нҷ•мқё | final verification нҷ•мқё | retention note нҷ•мқё | SSOT/WORKING м •лҰ¬ | P1 close нҢҗлӢЁ |

#### 3.5.1.1 Decision log sign-off record

кё°лЎқмқј: 2026-04-29

| Team | Sign-off | Scope | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| FE | signed off | `latest_signal_report`, stale/degraded warning, report/read model | Semantic report fields are sufficient for Telegram/report first use. Dashboard-specific views remain deferred. |
| DB | signed off | field classification, initial table direction, index/constraint planning | DDL remains blocked until `MIGRATION_GO`; PostgreSQL portability notes remain required in P1 implementation. |
| BE | signed off | DTO boundary, replay contract, repository boundary, `record_signal_bundle` transaction | Repository code must not hide unresolved schema rules; DTO tests come before DB code. |
| QC | signed off | DTO golden fixtures, migration idempotency, missing-link structured errors, tmp_path SQLite isolation | P1 tests must prove no repo `data/` writes and no live API dependency. |
| DevOps | signed off | SQLite/artifact path policy, no committed DB artifacts, backup/retention notes | Artifact refs must be portable; backup tooling is deferred. |
| Docs Gardener | signed off | SSOT decision log location, WORKING pointer, no duplicated schema truth | This section is the canonical P1 schema decision source. |
| CTO | `DECISION_LOG_GO` | final architecture go/no-go | Decision log is approved for P1 DTO/storage contract work. Migration/repository code still requires `MIGRATION_GO` and `REPOSITORY_GO`. |

#### 3.5.2 нҷ•м •лҗң м„Өкі„ л°©н–Ҙ

```text
storage_style:
- indexed relational core columns
- JSON detail for flexible replay payloads
- artifact_ref for large files and external/raw evidence

priority:
1. replay/audit
2. Telegram/report read model
3. future dashboard/materialized views

deferred:
- watchdog_event table until runtime watchdog implementation starts
- dashboard-specific summary/materialized views
- market provider-specific raw tables
- backup tooling implementation
```

#### 3.5.3 Field classification policy

Indexed columnsлЎң л‘ҳ н•„л“ң:

```text
- identifiers: signal_id, run_id, feature_snapshot_id, evidence_id, config_hash
- timestamps: created_at, observed_at, started_at, finished_at
- market keys: asset, underlying, timeframe
- state/action: action, status, degraded_mode
- scoring keys: final_score, config_hash
- freshness: data_freshness_status, stale_after
```

DTO-derived fieldsлЎң л‘ҳ н•„л“ң:

```text
- action_label
- risk_summary
- invalidation_summary
- data_warnings
- reason_summary
```

JSON detailлЎң л‘ҳ н•„л“ң:

```text
- reason_json
- guide_json
- component_scores_json
- raw_features_json
- raw_evidence_json
- error_json
```

Artifact/referenceлЎң л‘ҳ н•„л“ң:

```text
- chart_ref
- pdf_ref
- news_ref
- evidence_source_ref
```

к·ңм№ҷ:

```text
- report/list filteringм—җ н•„мҡ”н•ң к°’мқҖ JSON м•Ҳм—җл§Ң л„Јм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.
- detailed explanationкіј raw payloadлҠ” JSON/refлЎң л‘”лӢӨ.
- absolute local pathлҠ” DBм—җ мҳҒкө¬ м ҖмһҘн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.
- artifact_refлҠ” type + relative/ref path + metadataлЎң н‘ңнҳ„н•ҳкі , м ҲлҢҖ кІҪлЎң н•ҙм„қмқҖ runtime/devops layerм—җм„ң н•ңлӢӨ.
```

#### 3.5.4 DTO contracts

`latest_signal_report`лҠ” вҖңм§ҖкёҲ л¬ҙм—Үмқ„ н•ҙм•ј н•ҳлҠ”к°Җ?вҖқм—җ лӢөн•ҳлҠ” мөңмҶҢ лҰ¬нҸ¬нҠё DTOлӢӨ.

```text
required:
- signal_id
- created_at
- asset
- underlying
- timeframe
- action
- action_label
- final_score
- confidence
- entry_summary
- stop_summary
- take_profit_summary
- invalidation_summary
- risk_summary
- data_freshness_status
- degraded_mode
- data_warnings
- config_hash

optional:
- reason_summary
- evidence_summary
- label_status
- chart_ref
```

`signal_replay_bundle`мқҖ нҠ№м • мӢ нҳёлҘј мһ¬нҳ„н•ҳкё° мң„н•ң DTOлӢӨ.

```text
input:
- signal_id

must_return:
- signal_ledger record
- feature_store snapshot
- evidence_card refs/cards used at decision time
- strategy_config by config_hash
- run_journal context
- label_store outcome if available

missing_link_policy:
- missing required replay link returns structured error code
- partial replay must not silently succeed
```

`storage_health`лҠ” DB мҠӨлӘЁнҒ¬мҷҖ migration мғҒнғңлҘј мң„н•ң DTOлӢӨ.

```text
required:
- status
- driver
- database_kind
- migration_count
- latest_migration
- domain_tables_present
- live_data_required
```

#### 3.5.5 Initial table direction

Decision log мҠ№мқё нӣ„ мІ« migration нӣ„ліҙ:

```text
schema_migrations
strategy_config
run_journal
feature_store
evidence_card
signal_ledger
label_store
artifact_ref
```

к°Ғ н…Ңмқҙлё”мқҖ лӢӨмқҢ лӘ©м Ғмқ„ л§ҢмЎұн•ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ.

```text
strategy_config:
- config_hashлЎң м–ҙл–Ө к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ/мһ„кі„к°’мқ„ мҚјлҠ”м§Җ мһ¬нҳ„
- champion/challenger/archive мғҒнғң м¶”м Ғ

run_journal:
- cron/user/evaluation мӢӨн–ү лӢЁмң„ м¶”м Ғ
- idempotency_keyмҷҖ status кҙҖлҰ¬

feature_store:
- мӢ нҳё л°ңмғқ лӢ№мӢң мҲҳм№ҳ feature snapshot м ҖмһҘ
- replayмҷҖ labelingмқҳ кё°мӨҖ мһ…л Ҙ

evidence_card:
- лүҙмҠӨ/м •мұ…/м°ЁнҠё/PDF л“ұ нҢҗлӢЁ к·јкұ°мқҳ кө¬мЎ°нҷ” мҡ”м•Ҫ
- raw artifactлҠ” artifact_refлЎң л¶„лҰ¬

signal_ledger:
- мөңмў… action/score/entry/stop/take-profit/guide м ҖмһҘ
- config_hash, feature_snapshot_id, evidence refs, run_id м—°кІ°

label_store:
- triple barrier outcome, MFE/MAE, realized_r м ҖмһҘ
- signal_ledgerмҷҖ 1:N лҳҗлҠ” 1:1 м •мұ…мқҖ P1м—җм„ң нҷ•м •

artifact_ref:
- chart/pdf/news/raw evidence нҢҢмқј лҳҗлҠ” мҷёл¶Җ refлҘј м ҖмһҘ
- portable refл§Ң м ҖмһҘн•ҳкі  local absolute pathлҠ” н”јн•Ё
```

#### 3.5.6 Replay and write contracts

мІ« replay query:

```text
get_signal_replay_bundle(signal_id)
```

л°ҳнҷҳн•ҙм•ј н•ҳлҠ” кІғ:

```text
- signal_ledger row
- linked feature_store snapshot
- linked evidence_card records
- linked artifact_ref records when present
- strategy_config by config_hash
- run_journal context
- label_store outcome if present
```

мІ« transaction use case:

```text
record_signal_bundle
```

н•ң transactionм—җ нҸ¬н•Ён•  кІғ:

```text
- run_journal row or existing run_id validation
- feature_store snapshot
- evidence_card refs
- signal_ledger row
```

idempotency:

```text
- run_id/idempotency_keyлҠ” unique constraint нӣ„ліҙ
- config_hashлҠ” strategy_configм—җм„ң unique нӣ„ліҙ
- replayм—җ н•„мҡ”н•ң foreign key/ref л¬ҙкІ°м„ұмқҖ migration м „ кІ°м •
```

#### 3.5.7 P1 coding gate

мҪ”л“ң мһ‘м„ұ м „ л°ҳл“ңмӢң нҷ•м •н•  кІғ:

```text
- ID м •мұ…: UUID/ULID/text id мӨ‘ м„ нғқ
- timestamp м •мұ…: UTC ISO-8601 text лҳҗлҠ” epoch milliseconds мӨ‘ м„ нғқ
- initial table list
- indexed columns vs JSON detail vs artifact_ref кө¬л¶„
- unique constraints and indexes
- migration naming/idempotency rules
- FE/DB/BE/QC/DevOps/Docs sign-off
- CTO `DECISION_LOG_GO`
```

NO-GO:

```text
- decision log м—Ҷмқҙ migration мһ‘м„ұ
- `MIGRATION_GO` м—Ҷмқҙ migration/DDL мһ‘м„ұ
- `REPOSITORY_GO` м—Ҷмқҙ repository persistence мһ‘м„ұ
- DTOк°Җ live APIлӮҳ DBлҘј мҡ”кө¬
- н…ҢмҠӨнҠёк°Җ repo data/м—җ DB нҢҢмқј мғқм„ұ
- signal/reportк°Җ searchable core columns м—Ҷмқҙ JSON blobм—җл§Ң м ҖмһҘ
- repository layerк°Җ лҜёнҷ•м • schema ruleмқ„ мҲЁк№Җ
- READMEм—җ кІҖмҰқлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмқҖ DB command м¶”к°Җ
```

#### 3.7.2 нҢҖк°„ нҒ¬лЎңмҠӨ мІҙнҒ¬ кІ°кіј

```text
- env var, cron, supervisor, Hermes runtime, DB path, data directory мҡ”кө¬мӮ¬н•ӯмқ„ м¶”к°Җн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.
```

```text

- MIGRATION_GOмҷҖ REPOSITORY_GOлҠ” кі„мҶҚ blockedлЎң мң м§Җн•ңлӢӨ.
```

#### 3.10.2 нҢҖк°„ нҒ¬лЎңмҠӨ мІҙнҒ¬ кІ°кіј

1м°Ё ліҙмҷ„:

```text

- BE -> DB: domain DTO namesлҘј м“°кі  table/column namesлҠ” migration gateлЎң лҜёлЈ¬лӢӨ.
- QC -> BE: negative testsлҠ” missing required fieldмҷҖ invalid enumмқ„ нҸ¬н•Ён•ңлӢӨ.
- DevOps -> QC: path scanмқҖ new JSON fixturesмҷҖ DB artifact extension checkлЎң лӮҳлҲҲлӢӨ.
- Docs -> all: approved write scopeлҠ” CTO мһ¬мҠ№мқё м „к№Ңм§Җ м—¬м„Ҝ нҢҢмқј к·ёлҢҖлЎң мң м§Җн•ңлӢӨ.
```

```text
- https:// external refлҠ” н—Ҳмҡ©н•ҳкі  file:// л°Ҹ local absolute pathлҠ” кёҲм§Җн•ңлӢӨ.
- fixturesлҠ” required fieldлҘј лӘЁл‘җ нҸ¬н•Ён•ҳкі  testsлҠ” parsed/canonical JSONмңјлЎң л№„көҗн•ңлӢӨ.
- кө¬нҳ„ мҲңм„ңлҠ” contracts.py -> fixtures -> tests -> verificationмқҙлӢӨ.
```

### 3.14 P1 Contracts.py File Creation Checklist

> мғҒнғң: final checklist ready. Next action is to create `src/halo_swing_mcp/contracts.py`.

мқҙ м„№м…ҳмқҖ мӢӨн–үмҲңм„ң 1лІҲмқҳ л§Ҳм§Җл§ү мІҙнҒ¬нҸ¬мқёнҠёлӢӨ. лӢӨмқҢ мқ‘лӢөмқҖ лІ”мң„ ліҖкІҪмқҙ м—ҶлӢӨл©ҙ м¶”к°Җ кі„нҡҚмқҙ м•„лӢҲлқј `contracts.py` мғқм„ұмқҙм–ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ.

#### 3.14.1 нҢҖлі„ мғҒм„ё мІҙнҒ¬лҰ¬мҠӨнҠё

FE:

```text
- LatestSignalReport includes all required fields from 3.12.
- Optional report enrichments default to None: reason_summary, evidence_summary, label_status, chart_ref.
- chart_ref is ArtifactRef | None.
- TradeAction uses uppercase values: BUY_2X, BUY_3X, WAIT, TRIM, EXIT, STOP.
- No UI/Telegram/dashboard-only fields.
```

DB:

```text
- SignalReplayBundle uses named sections, not one opaque replay blob.
- ReplayMissingLinkError has code, message, missing_ref_type, missing_ref_id.
- missing_ref_id may be None.
- ArtifactRef has ref_type, ref, metadata.
- No sqlite3/SQL/repository/migration/table/column/database_url vocabulary or imports.
```

BE:

```text
- File order: imports, StrictBaseModel, enums, small models, main DTOs, __all__.
- StrictBaseModel uses ConfigDict(extra="forbid").
- confidence uses Field(ge=0, le=1); final_score remains unconstrained float.
- default_factory is allowed only for safe empty collections such as ArtifactRef.metadata.
- current-time, IO, env, network, settings, and path resolution are forbidden.
```

QC:

```text
- Required fields have no defaults.
- data_warnings is required list[str] and must be supplied by fixtures later.
- Optional fields default only to None.
- Enum fields are real enums.
- Extra fields are forbidden.
```

DevOps:

```text
- No new dependency.
- Import is side-effect free.
- ArtifactRef.ref is plain str and does not validate path/URL existence.
- ArtifactRefType includes CHART, PDF, NEWS, EXTERNAL, OTHER.
- Local/file path bans are enforced later by fixture path-scan tests.
```

Docs Gardener:

```text
- This is the final planning checkpoint for contracts.py creation.
- After code, WORKING records file-created and import-check result only.
- Next planned step remains golden fixture creation.
```

1м°Ё ліҙмҷ„:

```text
- FE -> BE: chart_ref must be ArtifactRef | None.
- BE -> FE: optional report enrichments default to None.
- DB -> BE: ReplayMissingLinkError needs structured missing ref fields.
- BE -> DB: missing_ref_id may be None.
- QC -> BE: mutable empty metadata must not use a raw {} default.
- DevOps -> QC: Field(default_factory=dict) is allowed only for empty metadata, not time/state.
- Docs -> all: default_factory ban is narrowed to dynamic/time/state factories.
```

2м°Ё ліҙмҷ„:

```text
- data_warnings remains required and has no default; fixtures must supply [] or non-empty list.
- ArtifactRef.metadata may use Field(default_factory=dict).
- ArtifactRefType includes CHART, PDF, NEWS, EXTERNAL, OTHER.
- ref string remains unconstrained; fixture tests later block local/file refs.
- next action is implementation, not further planning.
```

```text
- no-DB-artifact checkлҠ” DTO stage guardлЎң мң м§Җн•ңлӢӨ.
- docsлҠ” test codeлҘј ліөм ңн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.
```

2м°Ё ліҙмҷ„:

```text
- degraded-vs-normal comparisonмқҖ л‘җ report fixturesлҘј к°ҷмқҖ testм—җм„ң validateн•ң л’Ө мҲҳн–үн•ңлӢӨ.
- action comparisonмқҖ raw stringмқҙ м•„лӢҲлқј TradeAction enumкіј л№„көҗн•ңлӢӨ.
- repo rootлҠ” Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]лЎң кі„мӮ°н•ңлӢӨ.
- DB artifact scanмқҖ ROOT.rglob("*.sqlite")мҷҖ ROOT.rglob("*.sqlite3")лЎң м ңн•ңн•ңлӢӨ.
- path scan helperлҠ” /Users/, file://, ~/, drive-root prefixлҘј кІҖмӮ¬н•ңлӢӨ.
```

### 3.20 P1 Contract Tests Work Order

> мғҒнғң: work order ready. Next action is creating `tests/test_contracts.py`.

мқҙ м„№м…ҳмқҖ мӢӨн–үмҲңм„ң 3лІҲмқ„ мӢӨм ң н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҢҢмқј мһ‘м„ұ м§ҖмӢңм„ңлЎң кө¬мІҙнҷ”н•ңлӢӨ.

#### 3.20.1 нҢҖлі„ мғҒм„ё кі„нҡҚ

FE:

```text
- test_latest_signal_report_fixtures_validate_and_contrast мһ‘м„ұ.
- normal/degraded report fixturesлҘј LatestSignalReportлЎң validate.
- normal.action == TradeAction.BUY_2X, degraded.action == TradeAction.WAIT.
- degraded.confidence < normal.confidence.
- SUMMARY_FIELDS tupleлЎң entry/stop/take-profit/invalidation/risk summaryк°Җ non-empty stringмқём§Җ нҷ•мқё.
- exact proseлӮҳ нҲ¬мһҗ м •лӢөм„ұмқҖ н…ҢмҠӨнҠён•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.
```

DB:

```text
- test_signal_replay_bundle_fixture_validates_and_preserves_links мһ‘м„ұ.
- SignalReplayBundle fixture validate.
- replay payload expected keysлҠ” subset checkлЎң нҷ•мқё.
- signal.config_hash == strategy_config.config_hash.
- signal.run_id == run_journal.run_id.
- evidence_cards length >= 2.
- sqlite/DB/repository import кёҲм§Җ.
```

BE:

```text
- ROOT, GOLDEN_DIR, load_json helper мһ‘м„ұ.
- assert_round_trip helperлҠ” model.model_validate(payload).model_dump(mode="json")лҘј parsed JSONкіј л№„көҗн•ңлӢӨ.
- four fixtures round-trip tests мһ‘м„ұ.
- missing required field negative test: latest_signal_reportм—җм„ң signal_id м ңкұ°.
- invalid enum negative test: action=HOLD.
- pytest.raises(ValidationError) мӮ¬мҡ©.
```

QC:

```text
- recursive string walkerлЎң fixture nested string кІҖмӮ¬.
- path scan flags: /Users/, file://, strings starting with ~/, drive-root regex ^[A-Za-z]:[\\/], .sqlite, .sqlite3.
- path scanмқҖ four DTO golden fixtures м „мІҙм—җ м Ғмҡ©.
- ROOT.rglob("*.sqlite"), ROOT.rglob("*.sqlite3")лЎң DB artifactк°Җ м—ҶлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқё.
```

DevOps:

```text
- importsлҠ” stdlib json/re/pathlib, pytest, pydantic.ValidationError, contractsл§Ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ңлӢӨ.
- example.invalid refsлҘј fetchн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.
- jq/shell/network/env/browser/DB/service dependency кёҲм§Җ.
- no persistent local state.
```

Docs Gardener:

```text
- кө¬нҳ„ нӣ„ WORKINGм—җ tests/test_contracts.py createdмҷҖ verification result кё°лЎқ.
- docsлҠ” test codeлҘј ліөм ңн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.
- лӢӨмқҢ лӢЁкі„лҠ” DTO contract slice sign-off.
- MIGRATION_GOмҷҖ REPOSITORY_GOлҠ” кі„мҶҚ blocked.
```

### 3.21 Offline MVP Tool Implementation Record

> мғҒнғң: implemented. мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗ м§ҖмӢңлЎң P0/P1 мқҙнӣ„мқҳ н•өмӢ¬ MCP нҢҗлӢЁ кІҪлЎңлҘј
> live API м—Ҷмқҙ мһ¬нҳ„ к°ҖлҠҘн•ң offline MVPлЎң лЁјм Җ м—°кІ°н–ҲлӢӨ.

кө¬нҳ„ лІ”мң„:

```text
- deterministic fixture market/macro/event/news source
- pure Python RSI, DMI/ADX, MA, ATR, gap/support/resistance calculation
- strategy_config JSON, version, config_hash, champion/challenger separation
- leverage swing scoring for QLD/TQQQ/SSO/UPRO/SOXL/BTC universe
- trade guide with entry, stop, take-profit, invalidation, risk summary
- position review action: WAIT/TRIM/EXIT/STOP
- local JSONL signal ledger runtime adapter
- triple barrier outcome labeling with MFE/MAE/realized_R
- score performance and champion/challenger comparison
- dependency-free PNG chart renderer
- FastMCP tool registration and parameterized CLI harness
```

Reusable design boundaries:

```text
fixtures.py       deterministic replay source
indicators.py     calculation engine with no MCP/Hermes dependency
strategy.py       config hashing and validation
tools/market.py   market, macro, events, news, chart tool facade
tools/scoring.py  score, guide, position, feedback tool facade
tools/recording.py runtime ledger and labeler facade
harness.py        generic JSON-input CLI command runner
```

мҡҙмҳҒ м ңн•ң:

```text
- default mode is fixture/replay; live API adapters are not implemented yet
- automatic order execution remains out of MVP scope
- SQLite migrations and repository persistence remain a later hardening path
- runtime ledgers/charts are ignored artifacts and must not be committed
```

кІҖмҰқ кё°мӨҖ:

```bash
PYTHONPATH=src ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest
PYTHONPATH=src ./.venv/bin/python -m ruff check .
PYTHONPATH=src ./.venv/bin/python -m halo_swing_mcp.harness health_check
PYTHONPATH=src ./.venv/bin/python -m halo_swing_mcp.harness score_leverage_swing --input-json '{"asset":"TQQQ"}'
PYTHONPATH=src ./.venv/bin/python -m halo_swing_mcp.harness record_signal --input-json '{"ledger_path":"state/signal_ledger.jsonl"}'
PYTHONPATH=src ./.venv/bin/python -m halo_swing_mcp.harness label_signal_outcome --input-json '{"ledger_path":"state/signal_ledger.jsonl"}'
```

### 3.22 Audit Log And Web Viewer Record

> мғҒнғң: implemented. к°җмӮ¬ к°ҖлҠҘм„ұмқ„ мң„н•ҙ tool execution auditлҘј runtime
> JSONLлЎң лӮЁкё°кі , лЎңм»¬ мӣ№ UIм—җм„ң мЎ°нҡҢн•  мҲҳ мһҲкІҢ н–ҲлӢӨ.

м„Өкі„:

```text
audit.py             append-only audit JSONL, redaction, filtering, summary
tools/audit_tools.py MCP/CLI read tools: get_audit_log, get_audit_summary
harness.py           every CLI command writes success/failure audit events
server.py            MCP tool wrappers write success audit events
audit_web.py         local HTTP UI and JSON API for audit events
tests/test_audit.py  redaction, filtering, harness audit, web payload coverage
```

Audit event contract:

```text
schema_version
event_id
occurred_at
actor
action
resource_type
resource_id
outcome
correlation_id
details
```

Security and operations:

```text
- details are recursively redacted for api_key, authorization, cookie,
  credential, password, secret, and token fields
- runtime audit logs belong under ignored paths such as state/audit_log.jsonl
- tests use tmp_path or /private/tmp and must not create repo state artifacts
- web viewer is local-only by default: 127.0.0.1
- audit logging does not add dependencies, live APIs, broker code, or DB schema
```

Web viewer command:

```bash
PYTHONPATH=src ./.venv/bin/python -m halo_swing_mcp.audit_web --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765 --audit-log-path state/audit_log.jsonl
```

JSON API:

```text
GET /api/events?limit=100&resource_id=score_leverage_swing&outcome=success
GET /api/summary
```

## 4. к°ңл°ң мҲңм„ң

### Phase 0. н”„лЎңм қнҠё мҙҲкё°нҷ”

лӘ©н‘ң: MCP м„ңлІ„ к°ңл°ңмқ„ мң„н•ң кё°ліё кө¬мЎ°лҘј л§Ңл“ лӢӨ.

кІ°кіјл¬ј:

```text
- Python н”„лЎңм қнҠё мғқм„ұ
- MCP м„ңлІ„ мӢӨн–ү м§„мһ…м җ
- нҷҳкІҪліҖмҲҳ лЎңл”©
- SQLite м—°кІ°
- кё°ліё н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҷҳкІҪ
- Hermes м—°кІ° мҳҲмӢң config
```

### Phase 1. мӢңмһҘ лҚ°мқҙн„°мҷҖ м§Җн‘ң м—”м§„

лӘ©н‘ң: QQQ, SPY, SMH/SOXX, BTC к°ҖкІ© лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј к°Җм ёмҳӨкі  кё°ліё м§Җн‘ңлҘј кі„мӮ°н•ңлӢӨ.

кІ°кіјл¬ј:

```text
- get_market_snapshot
- calculate_indicators
- RSI, DMI/ADX, MA, ATR кі„мӮ°
- gap/support/resistance кё°ліё нғҗм§Җ
- feature_store м ҖмһҘ
```

### Phase 2. л ҲлІ„лҰ¬м§Җ ETF мҠӨмңҷ нҢҗлӢЁ м—”м§„

лӘ©н‘ң: 2л°°/3л°° л ҲлІ„лҰ¬м§Җ ETFмқҳ мҠӨмңҷ л§ӨмҲҳ/кҙҖл§қ/мІӯмӮ° к°Җмқҙл“ңлҘј л§Ңл“ лӢӨ.

кІ°кіјл¬ј:

```text
- score_leverage_swing
- generate_trade_guide
- strategy_config JSON лЎңл“ң/кІҖмҰқ
- BUY_2X / BUY_3X / WAIT / TRIM / EXIT / STOP нҢҗлӢЁ
- QQQ/SPY/SOX кё°мӨҖ м§„мһ…/мҶҗм Ҳ/мқөм Ҳ мЎ°кұҙ мғқм„ұ
```

### Phase 3. л§ӨнҒ¬лЎң/мқҙлІӨнҠё н•„н„°

лӘ©н‘ң: VIX, VXN, DXY, кёҲлҰ¬, мң к°Җ, мЈјмҡ” кІҪм ң мқҙлІӨнҠёлҘј л°ҳмҳҒн•ңлӢӨ.

кІ°кіјл¬ј:

```text
- get_macro_snapshot
- get_event_calendar
- event danger window кі„мӮ°
- CPI/FOMC/NFP/л№…н…ҢнҒ¬ мӢӨм Ғ м „ л§ӨмҲҳкёҲм§Җ лЎңм§Ғ
```

### Phase 4. лүҙмҠӨ/м •мұ…/м§Җм •н•ҷ м—”м§„

лӘ©н‘ң: Fed, Treasury, White House, EIA, Iran, AI/л°ҳлҸ„мІҙ лүҙмҠӨк°Җ мҠӨмңҷ нҢҗлӢЁм—җ лҜём№ҳлҠ” мҳҒн–Ҙмқ„ м җмҲҳнҷ”н•ңлӢӨ.

кІ°кіјл¬ј:

```text
- get_news_bundle
- evidence card мғқм„ұ
- news_score
- policy_score
- geopolitical_score
- AI/semiconductor theme_score
```

### Phase 5. мӢ нҳё кё°лЎқкіј кІ°кіј лқјлІЁл§Ғ

лӘ©н‘ң: лӘЁл“  мӢ нҳёлҘј м ҖмһҘн•ҳкі , мқјм • мӢңк°„мқҙ м§ҖлӮң л’Ө кІ°кіјлҘј мһҗлҸҷ лқјлІЁл§Ғн•ңлӢӨ.

кІ°кіјл¬ј:

```text
- record_signal
- label_signal_outcome
- triple barrier labeling
- MFE/MAE кі„мӮ°
- stop/take-profit/time-exit нҢҗм •
- мӢ нҳёлі„ config_version/config_hash м¶”м Ғ
- run_journal кё°лЎқ
```

### Phase 6. мҠӨмҪ”м–ҙл§Ғ н”јл“ңл°ұ нҢҢмқҙн”„лқјмқё

лӘ©н‘ң: мҠӨмҪ”м–ҙл§Ғмқҙ мӢӨм ңлЎң мң нҡЁн–ҲлҠ”м§Җ мһҗлҸҷ нҸүк°Җн•ңлӢӨ.

### Phase 7. Hermes нҶөн•©

лӘ©н‘ң: Hermesм—җм„ң MCP м„ңлІ„лҘј нҳём¶ңн•ҳкі  н…”л Ҳк·ёлһЁ/нҒ¬лЎ мңјлЎң лҰ¬нҸ¬нҠёлҘј л°ӣлҠ”лӢӨ.

кІ°кіјл¬ј:

```text
- ~/.hermes/config.yaml MCP л“ұлЎқ мҳҲмӢң
- лҜёкөӯмһҘ м „/мӨ‘/нӣ„ cron prompt
- н…”л Ҳк·ёлһЁ лҰ¬нҸ¬нҠё нҸ¬л§·
- ліҙмң  нҸ¬м§Җм…ҳ лҰ¬л·° н”„лЎ¬н”„нҠё
```

### Phase 8. л©ҖнӢ°лӘЁлӢ¬ нҢҗлӢЁ нҷ•мһҘ

лӘ©н‘ң: м°ЁнҠё мқҙлҜём§Җ, PDF, н‘ң, лүҙмҠӨ мәЎмІҳ л“ұ л©ҖнӢ°лӘЁлӢ¬ мһҗлЈҢлҘј Hermes нҢҗлӢЁм—җ нҸ¬н•Ён•ңлӢӨ.

кІ°кіјл¬ј:

```text
- render_chart
- chart image artifact
- PDF/л¬ём„ң мҡ”м•Ҫ мһ…л Ҙ
- evidence cardм—җ modality м ҖмһҘ
- Hermes мөңмў… л©ҖнӢ°лӘЁлӢ¬ лҰ¬нҸ¬нҠё
```

### Phase 9. м„ нғқ мӮ¬н•ӯ: мЈјл¬ё м—°лҸҷ

лӘ©н‘ң: лёҢлЎңм»Ө/кұ°лһҳмҶҢ м—°лҸҷмқ„ л¶ҷмқҙлҗҳ кё°ліёк°’мқҖ мҲҳлҸҷ мҠ№мқёмңјлЎң мң м§Җн•ңлӢӨ.

кІ°кіјл¬ј:

## 5. к°Ғ мҲңм„ңм—җ л§һлҠ” мғҒм„ё к°ңл°ң кі„нҡҚ

### Phase 0 мғҒм„ё кі„нҡҚ: н”„лЎңм қнҠё мҙҲкё°нҷ”

мһ‘м—…:

```text
1. `market_swing_mcp` н”„лЎңм қнҠё мғқм„ұ
2. `.venv` кё°л°ҳ `requirements.txt` мһ‘м„ұ
3. MCP м„ңлІ„ мӢӨн–ү лӘ…л № м •мқҳ
4. `.env.example` мһ‘м„ұ
5. кё°ліё health check лҸ„кө¬ мһ‘м„ұ
6. MCP tool м§Ғм ‘ мӢӨн–үмҡ© CLI/test harness мһ‘м„ұ
7. fixture/golden test л””л үн„°лҰ¬ мғқм„ұ
8. DevOps к°ңл°ңнҷҳкІҪ/Hermes м„Өм • к°Җмқҙл“ң мһ‘м„ұ
9. P1 storage/schema м„Өкі„ лІ”мң„ нҷ•м •
```

мҷ„лЈҢ кё°мӨҖ:

```text
- `.venv` кё°л°ҳ MCP м„ңлІ„ лӘ…л № мӢӨн–ү к°ҖлҠҘ
- Hermes MCP configм—җ л“ұлЎқ к°ҖлҠҘ
- `health_check` нҳём¶ң мӢң м •мғҒ мқ‘лӢө
- `health_check`лҘј Hermes м—Ҷмқҙ CLI/test harnessлЎң кІҖмҰқ к°ҖлҠҘ
- `tests/fixtures/`мҷҖ golden output кө¬мЎ° мЎҙмһ¬
- DevOps к°Җмқҙл“ңм—җ лЎңм»¬ м„Өм№ҳ, smoke, Hermes MCP м„Өм • м Ҳм°Ёк°Җ мЎҙмһ¬
- SQLite/schemaлҠ” P1м—җм„ң feature_store, signal_ledger, strategy_config, runtime observabilityлҘј н•Ёк»ҳ ліҙкі  м„Өкі„
```

P0 storage/schema лІ”мң„:

```text
P0м—җм„ңлҠ” SQLite skeletonкіј лҸ„л©”мқё мҠӨнӮӨл§ҲлҘј л§Ңл“Өм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.
P1 мӢңмһ‘ мӢң storage/schema architecture reviewлҘј лЁјм Җ мҲҳн–үн•ңлӢӨ.
мқҙл•Ң feature_store, signal_ledger, label_store, strategy_config, run_journal, checkpoint, watchdog_eventлҘј н•Ёк»ҳ кІҖнҶ н•ңлӢӨ.
```

Phase 0 Hermes м„Өм • мҳҲмӢң:

```yaml
mcp_servers:
  market_swing:
    type: stdio
    command: "./.venv/bin/python"
    args: ["-m", "halo_swing_mcp.server"]
    env:
      PYTHONPATH: "src"
    tools:
      include:
        - health_check
    resources: false
```

мӢңмһҘ/л§ӨнҒ¬лЎң/лүҙмҠӨ API keyмҷҖ м¶”к°Җ лҸ„кө¬ л“ұлЎқмқҖ н•ҙлӢ№ phase кө¬нҳ„ нӣ„ DevOps к°Җмқҙл“ңмҷҖ н•Ёк»ҳ нҷ•мһҘн•ңлӢӨ.

### Phase 1 мғҒм„ё кі„нҡҚ: мӢңмһҘ лҚ°мқҙн„°мҷҖ м§Җн‘ң м—”м§„

мһ‘м—…:

```text
1. OHLCV мҲҳм§‘кё° кө¬нҳ„
2. QQQ, SPY, SMH, SOXX, BTC кё°ліё мӢ¬ліј м§Җмӣҗ
3. мқјлҙү, 4мӢңк°„лҙү, 1мӢңк°„лҙү м§Җмӣҗ
4. RSI кі„мӮ°
5. DMI/ADX кі„мӮ°
6. MA 10/20/50/200 кі„мӮ°
7. ATR кі„мӮ°
8. gap, previous swing high/low нғҗм§Җ
9. feature_store м ҖмһҘ
10. OHLCV fixture кё°л°ҳ indicator harness мһ‘м„ұ
```

мЈјмқҳ:

```text
- л ҲлІ„лҰ¬м§Җ ETF мӢ нҳё кі„мӮ°мқҖ TQQQ/QLD к°ҖкІ©ліҙлӢӨ QQQ кё°мӨҖмқ„ мҡ°м„ н•ңлӢӨ.
- SOXLмқҖ SOXX/SMH/SOXмҷҖ мЈјмҡ” л°ҳлҸ„мІҙ мЈјлҸ„мЈјлҘј н•Ёк»ҳ ліёлӢӨ.
- BTCлҠ” 24мӢңк°„мһҘмқҙлҜҖлЎң лҜёкөӯмһҘ кё°мӨҖ мқҙлІӨнҠёмҷҖ лі„лҸ„ мӢңк°„м¶•мқ„ л‘”лӢӨ.
```

мҷ„лЈҢ кё°мӨҖ:

```text
- `calculate_indicators("QQQ", "1d")` м •мғҒ мқ‘лӢө
- `get_market_snapshot(["QQQ", "SPY", "SMH", "BTC"])` м •мғҒ мқ‘лӢө
- м§Җн‘ң кі„мӮ° н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј
- fixture кё°л°ҳ indicator golden test нҶөкіј
```

### Phase 2 мғҒм„ё кі„нҡҚ: л ҲлІ„лҰ¬м§Җ ETF мҠӨмңҷ нҢҗлӢЁ м—”м§„

мһ‘м—…:


мҙҲкё° лЈ°:

```text
л№…н…ҢнҒ¬ мӢӨм Ғ:
```

```text
м ңм•Ҳ:
```

мҷ„лЈҢ кё°мӨҖ:

```text
- нӣ„ліҙ JSONмқҖ validationмқ„ нҶөкіјн•ҙм•ј н•ҳл©° active м„Өм •мқ„ м§Ғм ‘ лҚ®м–ҙм“°м§Җ м•ҠмқҢ
```

мҷ„лЈҢ кё°мӨҖ:


## 6. л¶ҖлЎқ: кі„мӮ° кҙҖл Ё к·јкұ°

### A. RSI

RSIлҠ” нҸүк·  мғҒмҠ№нҸӯкіј нҸүк·  н•ҳлқҪнҸӯмқҳ л№„мңЁлЎң лӘЁл©ҳн…Җ кіјм—ҙ/кіјл§ӨлҸ„лҘј мёЎм •н•ңлӢӨ.

```text
RS = average_gain / average_loss
RSI = 100 - 100 / (1 + RS)
```

мӮ¬мҡ©:

```text
RSI 30 мқҙн•ҳ:
- кіјл§ӨлҸ„ нӣ„ліҙ
- лӢЁлҸ… л§ӨмҲҳ мӢ нҳёк°Җ м•„лӢҲлқј л°ҳл“ұ нӣ„ліҙ мЎ°кұҙ

RSI 65~75 мқҙмғҒ:
- кіјм—ҙ нӣ„ліҙ
- лӢЁлҸ… л§ӨлҸ„ мӢ нҳёк°Җ м•„лӢҲлқј мқөм Ҳ ліҙмЎ° мЎ°кұҙ
```

### B. DMI / ADX

DMIлҠ” мғҒмҠ№ л°©н–Ҙ мӣҖм§Ғмһ„кіј н•ҳлқҪ л°©н–Ҙ мӣҖм§Ғмһ„мқ„ л№„көҗн•ңлӢӨ.

```text
up_move = high_t - high_{t-1}
down_move = low_{t-1} - low_t

+DM = up_move if up_move > down_move and up_move > 0 else 0
-DM = down_move if down_move > up_move and down_move > 0 else 0

TR = max(
  high_t - low_t,
  abs(high_t - close_{t-1}),
  abs(low_t - close_{t-1})
)

+DI = 100 * smoothed(+DM) / smoothed(TR)
-DI = 100 * smoothed(-DM) / smoothed(TR)
DX = 100 * abs(+DI - -DI) / (+DI + -DI)
ADX = smoothed(DX)
```

мӮ¬мҡ©:

```text
-DI кёүл“ұ:
- н•ҳлқҪ м••л Ҙ к°•н•Ё
- кіјл§ӨлҸ„ нҒҙлҹ¬мҠӨн„° нӣ„ліҙ
- л°ҳм „ нҷ•мқё м—Ҷмқҙ л°”лЎң л§ӨмҲҳн•ҳл©ҙ мң„н—ҳ

+DI кёүл“ұ:
- мғҒмҠ№ м••л Ҙ к°•н•Ё
- ліҙмң  лЎұмқҳ мқөм Ҳ ліҙмЎ° мӢ нҳё
- к°•н•ң м¶”м„ём—җм„ңлҠ” мЎ°кё°л§ӨлҸ„ мң„н—ҳлҸ„ мЎҙмһ¬
```

### C. ATR

ATRмқҖ ліҖлҸҷм„ұ кё°л°ҳ мҶҗм ҲнҸӯ кі„мӮ°м—җ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ңлӢӨ.

```text
ATR = moving_average(TR, n)
```

мҶҗм Ҳ нӣ„ліҙ:

```text
stop_price = entry_price - k * ATR
```

л ҲлІ„лҰ¬м§Җ ETFлҠ” кё°мҙҲмһҗмӮ° кё°мӨҖ мҶҗм Ҳмқ„ мҡ°м„ н•ңлӢӨ.

```text
TQQQ мҶҗм Ҳ кё°мӨҖ:
- TQQQ к°ҖкІ© мһҗмІҙліҙлӢӨ QQQ м „м Җм җ/ATR/MA мқҙнғҲ кё°мӨҖ мҡ°м„ 
```

### D. мқҙлҸҷнҸүк· кіј м¶”м„ё н•„н„°

мҙҲкё° м¶”м„ё мЎ°кұҙ:

```text
мғҒмҠ№ м¶”м„ё:
- close > MA50
- MA20 slope > 0
- close > MA200

мЈјмқҳ кө¬к°„:
- close < MA50
- MA20 slope < 0

л§ӨмҲҳ кёҲм§Җ нӣ„ліҙ:
- close < MA200
- MA50 < MA200
```

### E. к°ӯкіј м Җн•ӯ

к°ӯ л©”мӣҖмқҖ мҠӨмңҷ мқөм Ҳ нӣ„ліҙлЎң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ңлӢӨ.

```text
gap_up:
previous_high < current_low

gap_down:
previous_low > current_high
```

мқөм Ҳ нӣ„ліҙ:

```text
- м§Ғм „ к°ӯ н•ҳлӢЁ/мғҒлӢЁ
- м§Ғм „ swing high
- 50мқјм„  лҳҗлҠ” 200мқјм„  мһ¬м ‘к·ј
- мқҙм „ лҢҖлҹүкұ°лһҳ кө¬к°„
```

### F. Triple Barrier Labeling

мӢ нҳёмқҳ м„ұкіө м—¬л¶ҖлҠ” лӢЁмҲңнһҲ Nмқј л’Ө мҲҳмқөлҘ лЎң нҢҗлӢЁн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ. мҶҗм Ҳм„ кіј мқөм Ҳм„  мӨ‘ л¬ҙм—Үмқ„ лЁјм Җ л§һм•ҳлҠ”м§Җ ліёлӢӨ.

```text
upper_barrier = entry_price * (1 + take_profit_pct)
lower_barrier = entry_price * (1 - stop_loss_pct)
time_barrier = entry_time + N trading days
```

кІ°кіј:

```text
TAKE_PROFIT_FIRST:
- upper_barrierлҘј лЁјм Җ н„°м№ҳ

STOP_LOSS_FIRST:
- lower_barrierлҘј лЁјм Җ н„°м№ҳ

TIME_EXIT:
- мӢңк°„ мһҘлІҪк№Ңм§Җ л‘ҳ лӢӨ лҜёлҸ„лӢ¬
```

мқҙ л°©мӢқмқҖ мҠӨмңҷ л§Өл§Өмқҳ кІҪлЎң мқҳмЎҙм„ұмқ„ л°ҳмҳҒн•ңлӢӨ.

### G. MFE / MAE

MFEлҠ” мӢ нҳё мқҙнӣ„ мөңлҢҖ мң лҰ¬ мқҙлҸҷнҸӯ, MAEлҠ” мөңлҢҖ л¶ҲлҰ¬ мқҙлҸҷнҸӯмқҙлӢӨ.

```text
MFE = max(price_path - entry_price) / entry_price
MAE = min(price_path - entry_price) / entry_price
```

лЎұ кё°мӨҖ:

```text
MFEк°Җ нҒ¬кі  MAEк°Җ мһ‘мңјл©ҙ мўӢмқҖ мӢ нҳё
MFEк°Җ мһ‘кі  MAEк°Җ нҒ¬л©ҙ лӮҳмҒң мӢ нҳё
```

### H. кё°лҢҖк°’

R лӢЁмң„ мҶҗмқөмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ңлӢӨ.

```text
R = мҶҗмӢӨ мң„н—ҳ 1лӢЁмң„
realized_R = realized_pnl / initial_risk
expected_R = p_win * avg_win_R - p_loss * avg_loss_R
```

мӢӨн–ү мЎ°кұҙ:

```text
expected_R > 0
p_stop_lossк°Җ кіјлҸ„н•ҳкІҢ лҶ’м§Җ м•ҠмқҢ
MFE/MAE л№„мңЁ м–‘нҳё
```

### I. м җмҲҳм—җм„ң нҷ•лҘ лЎң м „нҷҳ

мҙҲкё°м—җлҠ” лЈ° кё°л°ҳ м җмҲҳлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ңлӢӨ.

```text
raw_score =
  trend_score * w_trend
+ macro_score * w_macro
+ volatility_score * w_volatility
+ breadth_score * w_breadth
+ theme_score * w_theme
+ event_risk_score * w_event
```

мқҙнӣ„ лҚ°мқҙн„°к°Җ мҢ“мқҙл©ҙ нҷ•лҘ  лӘЁлҚёлЎң м „нҷҳн•ңлӢӨ.

```text
p_take_profit = model(features)
p_stop_loss = model(features)
expected_R = p_take_profit * avg_win_R - p_stop_loss * avg_loss_R
```

мҙҲкё° нӣ„ліҙ:

```text
- Logistic Regression
- Gradient Boosting
- Random Forest
- XGBoost/LightGBM
```

мЈјмқҳ:

```text
- мӢ нҳё мҲҳк°Җ м Ғмқ„ л•Ң ліөмһЎн•ң лӘЁлҚё кёҲм§Җ
- лЁјм Җ лЈ° кё°л°ҳ + мәҳлҰ¬лёҢл Ҳмқҙм…ҳ лҰ¬нҸ¬нҠёлЎң мӢңмһ‘
```

### J. мҠӨмҪ”м–ҙ мәҳлҰ¬лёҢл Ҳмқҙм…ҳ

м җмҲҳ кө¬к°„лі„ мӢӨм ң м„ұкіјлҘј л№„көҗн•ңлӢӨ.

```text
score 0.30~0.40: м„ұкіөлҘ  x%
score 0.40~0.50: м„ұкіөлҘ  y%
score 0.50~0.60: м„ұкіөлҘ  z%
score 0.60 мқҙмғҒ: м„ұкіөлҘ  w%
```

мўӢмқҖ мҠӨмҪ”м–ҙл§ҒмқҖ м җмҲҳк°Җ лҶ’мқ„мҲҳлЎқ мӢӨм ң м„ұкіјлҸ„ мўӢм•„м•ј н•ңлӢӨ.

л¬ём ң мӢ нҳё:

```text
0.70 мқҙмғҒ мӢ нҳёк°Җ 0.40лҢҖ мӢ нҳёліҙлӢӨ м„ұкіјк°Җ лӮҳмҒЁ
вҶ’ к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ лҳҗлҠ” feature м •мқҳ л¬ём ң
```

### K. Ablation Test

лӘЁл“Ҳлі„ кё°м—¬лҸ„лҘј нҷ•мқён•ңлӢӨ.

```text
full_model
minus_trend_score
minus_macro_score
minus_volatility_score
minus_theme_score
minus_event_risk_score
```

н•ҙм„қ:

```text
нҠ№м • лӘЁл“Ҳ м ңкұ° нӣ„ м„ұкіјк°Җ мўӢм•„м§җ
вҶ’ н•ҙлӢ№ лӘЁл“Ҳмқҙ л…ёмқҙмҰҲмқҙкұ°лӮҳ к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ кіјлҢҖ

нҠ№м • лӘЁл“Ҳ м ңкұ° нӣ„ мҶҗм ҲлҘ  мҰқк°Җ
вҶ’ н•ҙлӢ№ лӘЁл“ҲмқҖ лҰ¬мҠӨнҒ¬ л°©м–ҙм—җ кё°м—¬
```

### L. Champion / Challenger

мһҗлҸҷ к°ңм„ мқҖ мӢӨм „ лӘЁлҚём—җ л°”лЎң л°ҳмҳҒн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.

```text
Champion:
- нҳ„мһ¬ мӢӨмӮ¬мҡ© лӘЁлҚё

Challenger:
- мғҲ к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ/мһ„кі„к°’ нӣ„ліҙ

Shadow:
- мӢӨм ң м•ҢлҰјм—җлҠ” м“°м§Җ м•Ҡкі  л’Өм—җм„ңл§Ң кІ°кіј л№„көҗ
```

мҠ№кІ© мЎ°кұҙ мҳҲмӢң:

```text
- мөңмҶҢ 30~100к°ң мӢ нҳё
- мөңмҶҢ 4~8мЈј кІҖмҰқ
- realized_R к°ңм„ 
- stop_loss_first л№„мңЁ к°җмҶҢ
- 3X мӢ нҳёмқҳ drawdown м•…нҷ” м—ҶмқҢ
```

### M. л ҲлІ„лҰ¬м§Җ ETF ліөлҰ¬ нҡЁкіј

2л°°/3л°° ETFлҠ” мқјмқј мҲҳмқөлҘ  л°°мҲҳлҘј лӘ©н‘ңлЎң н•ңлӢӨ. ліҙмң кё°к°„мқҙ кёём–ҙм§Җл©ҙ кё°мҙҲм§ҖмҲҳмқҳ лӢЁмҲң л°°мҲҳмҷҖ лӢ¬лқјм§Ҳ мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

кё°мҙҲм§ҖмҲҳ мқјлі„ мҲҳмқөлҘ мқҙ `r_t`мқҙкі  л ҲлІ„лҰ¬м§Җк°Җ `L`мқҙл©ҙ мқҙлЎ мғҒ л ҲлІ„лҰ¬м§Җ ETF кІҪлЎңлҠ” лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷлӢӨ.

```text
leveraged_return_path = product(1 + L * r_t) - 1
underlying_simple_multiple = L * (product(1 + r_t) - 1)
```

л‘җ к°’мқҖ мқјл°ҳм ҒмңјлЎң к°ҷм§Җ м•ҠлӢӨ. ліҖлҸҷм„ұмқҙ лҶ’кі  нҡЎліҙн• мҲҳлЎқ л ҲлІ„лҰ¬м§Җ ETFлҠ” л¶ҲлҰ¬н•ҙм§Ҳ мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

кҙҖл Ё м°ёкі :

```text
- SEC Leveraged and Inverse ETF Bulletin
  https://www.investor.gov/introduction-investing/general-resources/news-alerts/alerts-bulletins/investor-alerts/sec

- FINRA Leveraged and Inverse ETPs
  https://www.finra.org/investors/insights/lowdown-leveraged-and-inverse-exchange-traded-products
```

### N. 2л°°мҷҖ 3л°° м„ нғқ кё°мӨҖ

мҙҲкё° к·ңм№ҷ:

```text
BUY_3X:
- trend_score лҶ’мқҢ
- volatility_score м–‘нҳё
- event_risk лӮ®мқҢ
- expected_R м¶©л¶„нһҲ лҶ’мқҢ
- мҳҲмғҒ ліҙмң кё°к°„ м§§мқҢ

BUY_2X:
- м¶”м„ёлҠ” м–‘нҳён•ҳм§Җл§Ң ліҖлҸҷм„ұ лҳҗлҠ” мқҙлІӨнҠё лҰ¬мҠӨнҒ¬ мЎҙмһ¬
- мҳҲмғҒ ліҙмң кё°к°„мқҙ лҚ” кёё мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ
- 3Xмқҳ MAEк°Җ л„Ҳл¬ҙ нҒј

WAIT:
- expected_R лӮ®мқҢ
- p_stop_loss лҶ’мқҢ
- event danger window
```

### O. лҰ¬мҠӨнҒ¬ мҳҲмӮ°

нҸ¬м§Җм…ҳ нҒ¬кё°лҠ” мӢ нҳё к°•лҸ„к°Җ м•„лӢҲлқј мҶҗмӢӨ к°ҖлҠҘм•Ў кё°мӨҖмңјлЎң м •н•ңлӢӨ.

```text
risk_amount = account_equity * risk_budget_pct
position_size = risk_amount / abs(entry_price - stop_price)
```

л ҲлІ„лҰ¬м§Җ ETFм—җм„ңлҠ” кё°мҙҲмһҗмӮ° кё°мӨҖ мҶҗм ҲнҸӯмқ„ ETF мҳҲмғҒ мҶҗмӢӨнҸӯмңјлЎң ліҖнҷҳн•ңлӢӨ.

```text
estimated_etf_loss_pct вүҲ leverage * underlying_stop_pct
```

лӢЁ, мӢӨм ң ETF к°ҖкІ©, мҠ¬лҰ¬н”јм§Җ, к°ӯ, ліҖлҸҷм„ұ dragлҘј кі л Өн•ҙ ліҙмҲҳм ҒмңјлЎң мһЎлҠ”лӢӨ.

### P. кіјмөңм Ғнҷ” л°©м§Җ к·јкұ°

л°ұн…ҢмҠӨнҠё мөңм Ғнҷ”лҠ” м„ нғқ нҺён–Ҙкіј кіјмөңм Ғнҷ” мң„н—ҳмқҙ нҒ¬лӢӨ. нҠ№нһҲ м—¬лҹ¬ нҢҢлқјлҜён„°мҷҖ м—¬лҹ¬ м „лһөмқ„ л°ҳліө л№„көҗн•ҳл©ҙ мҡ°м—°нһҲ мўӢм•„ ліҙмқҙлҠ” мЎ°н•©мқҙ мүҪкІҢ лӮҳмҳЁлӢӨ.

л”°лқјм„ң лӢӨмқҢ мӣҗм№ҷмқ„ м Ғмҡ©н•ңлӢӨ.

```text
- нҢҢлқјлҜён„° ліҖкІҪмқҖ м ңн•ңм ҒмңјлЎң
- out-of-sample м„ұлҠҘ мҡ°м„ 
- walk-forward кІҖмҰқ
- Champion/Challenger shadow кІҖмҰқ
- Deflated Sharpe Ratio лҳҗлҠ” мң мӮ¬н•ң ліҙмҲҳм Ғ м„ұкіј м§Җн‘ң кІҖнҶ 
- лӢЁмқј мһҘм„ём—җм„ң л§һм¶ҳ лЈ°мқ„ м „мІҙ мһҘм„ём—җ м Ғмҡ©н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмқҢ
```

кҙҖл Ё м°ёкі :

```text
- Bailey, Borwein, LГіpez de Prado, Zhu, The Probability of Backtest Overfitting
  https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=2326253

- Bailey, LГіpez de Prado, The Deflated Sharpe Ratio
  https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=2460551
```

### Q. мҙҲкё° мҠӨмҪ”м–ҙл§Ғ мҳҲмӢң

мҙҲкё° лЈ° кё°л°ҳ мҠӨмҪ”м–ҙ:

```text
index_swing_score =
  trend_score        * 0.25
+ macro_score        * 0.20
+ volatility_score   * 0.20
+ breadth_score      * 0.15
+ theme_score        * 0.10
+ event_risk_score   * 0.10
```

мҙҲкё° нҢҗлӢЁ:

```text
score >= 0.60:
  BUY_3X нӣ„ліҙ

0.35 <= score < 0.60:
  BUY_2X нӣ„ліҙ

0.10 <= score < 0.35:
  BUY_WATCH

-0.10 <= score < 0.10:
  WAIT

score < -0.10:
  BLOCK лҳҗлҠ” EXIT кІҖнҶ 
```

н–Ҙнӣ„ к°ңм„ :

```text
- scoreлҘј нҷ•лҘ лЎң мәҳлҰ¬лёҢл Ҳмқҙм…ҳ
- p_take_profit, p_stop_loss, expected_R мӨ‘мӢ¬мңјлЎң нҢҗлӢЁ ліҖкІҪ
- лЈ° кё°л°ҳ м җмҲҳлҠ” feature лҳҗлҠ” priorлЎң мӮ¬мҡ©
```

### R. Hermes мөңмў… лҰ¬нҸ¬нҠё нҸ¬л§·

```text
лҢҖмғҒ: QLD / TQQQ
нҢҗлӢЁ: BUY_2X
мӢ лў°лҸ„: мӨ‘к°„

к·јкұ°:
- QQQ 50мқјм„  л°©м–ҙ
- VIX н•ҳлқҪ м „нҷҳ
- DXY/кёҲлҰ¬ кёүл“ұ м§„м •
- AI/л°ҳлҸ„мІҙ мЈјлҸ„мЈј нҡҢліө

м§„мһ…:
- QQQк°Җ м „мқј кі м җ нҡҢліө мӢң л¶„н•  м§„мһ…

мҶҗм Ҳ:
- QQQ м „м Җм җ мқҙнғҲ
- VIX мһ¬кёүл“ұ
- м§„мһ… нӣ„ 3кұ°лһҳмқј лӮҙ л°ҳл“ұ мӢӨнҢЁ

мқөм Ҳ:
- QQQ к°ӯ л©”мӣҖ
- м§Ғм „ м Җн•ӯ лҸ„лӢ¬
- RSI 70 мқҙмғҒ + +DI кіјм—ҙ

мЈјмқҳ:
- FOMC/CPI/NFP мқҙлІӨнҠёк°Җ к°Җк№Ңмҡ°л©ҙ 3X кёҲм§Җ
- 2X мҡ°м„ , 3XлҠ” ліҖлҸҷм„ұ м¶”к°Җ н•ҳлқҪ нҷ•мқё нӣ„
```

penaltyлҘј кІ°н•©н•ң `deflated_sharpe_proxy.v1` ліҙмҲҳ м§Җн‘ңлҘј `overfit_guard`м—җ м¶”к°Җн–ҲлӢӨ.

нҡЁкіј л¶„лҘҳ:

```text
short + BUY  -> reduces_short / closes_short / flips_short_to_long
```

behavior.

before constructing the local HTTP server. Invalid explicit or environment path
values should fail as operator input errors before handler creation,
`ThreadingHTTPServer` construction, socket bind attempts, default-state
fallback, or malformed local file creation. This slice pins that startup guard.

```text
implemented:

  - invalid HALO_SWING_AUDIT_LOG_PATH values fail before default-state fallback, handler creation, server construction, socket binding, or malformed local file creation
```

## 3.468 Audit Web Port Guard Record - 2026-05-13

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

The audit web CLI accepts a numeric `--port` argument before resolving the
audit log path and constructing the local HTTP server. Invalid values such as
`-1` or `65536` should fail as operator input errors before audit path
resolution, `ThreadingHTTPServer` construction, or socket bind attempts, while
preserving `0` as the valid ephemeral-port path. This slice pins that startup
guard.

## 3.465 Trading Admin UTF-8 Body Boundary Record - 2026-05-13

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

Trading admin POST bodies are decoded as UTF-8 JSON before route dispatch.
Previously, invalid byte sequences surfaced Python's raw decode error. This
slice converts invalid UTF-8 bodies into a stable JSON 400 response before any
credential write, connectivity call, account read, order preview, risk settings
write, or risk state write can run, and verifies submitted secret-looking text
is not echoed in the response.

## 3.462 Trading Admin Content-Length Boundary Record - 2026-05-13

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

Trading admin POST parsing previously treated nonpositive `Content-Length`
values as an empty JSON object. That preserved empty-body compatibility, but a
negative request length could still dispatch to route-side functions such as
connectivity checks or risk-state reset. This slice validates the header
explicitly so negative or nonnumeric `Content-Length` values return JSON 400
before any route-side side-effect path can run, without echoing submitted
secret-looking body text.

## 3.447 Readiness Binance Credentials Environment Path Validation Record - 2026-05-13

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

Direct Binance credential tools already validate
`HALO_SWING_BINANCE_CREDENTIALS_PATH` with env-key-specific errors. The
readiness tool, however, converted `settings.binance_credentials_path` into an
explicit `credentials_path` before calling credential status helpers. That made
invalid env defaults surface as generic explicit-path errors and weakened the
readiness boundary. This slice leaves default credential path resolution inside
the credential helper so readiness uses the same env validation contract.

### B. кө¬нҳ„ кІ°кіј

```text
status: verified
implemented:
  - get_integration_readiness passes None for default Binance credential path resolution
  - get_binance_credentials_status remains the single resolver for HALO_SWING_BINANCE_CREDENTIALS_PATH in readiness evidence
  - valid HALO_SWING_BINANCE_CREDENTIALS_PATH values are trimmed and reflected in both Binance readiness gates
  - blank or control-character HALO_SWING_BINANCE_CREDENTIALS_PATH values raise with the env key before fallback or readiness evidence construction
  - tests verify no fallback credential file is created for invalid env credential paths
```

## 3.446 Binance Boolean Environment Canonicalization Record - 2026-05-13

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

Readiness and execution guards explicitly require
`HALO_SWING_BINANCE_ENABLE_LIVE_TRADING=true`, while the default settings loader
used Pydantic's permissive boolean parsing. That allowed aliases such as `1`,
`yes`, or `on` to satisfy Binance execution policy booleans. This slice requires
canonical `true`/`false` strings for Binance policy env booleans before readiness
or execution policy evaluation.

### B. кө¬нҳ„ кІ°кіј

```text
status: verified
implemented:
  - HALO_SWING_BINANCE_TESTNET validates to canonical true/false strings only
  - HALO_SWING_BINANCE_FORCE_TESTNET_EXECUTION validates to canonical true/false strings only
  - HALO_SWING_BINANCE_ENABLE_LIVE_TRADING validates to canonical true/false strings only
  - readiness coverage verifies canonical env values are reflected in Binance gate evidence
  - noncanonical aliases are rejected before credential file fallback or gate evaluation can proceed
```

## 3.445 Artifact Directory Environment Validation Record - 2026-05-13

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

`Settings.artifact_dir` already exists as the configurable artifact root, but
`render_chart` still hardcoded `artifacts/charts` whenever callers omitted
`output_dir`. This meant malformed `HALO_SWING_ARTIFACT_DIR` values were ignored
and default chart writes could silently fall back to the project artifact path.
This slice makes the settings-backed artifact directory explicit and validates
it before chart directory creation.

### B. кө¬нҳ„ кІ°кіј

```text
status: verified
implemented:
  - render_chart default output now resolves from validated settings.artifact_dir
  - valid HALO_SWING_ARTIFACT_DIR values are trimmed and used under the charts subdirectory
  - blank or control-character HALO_SWING_ARTIFACT_DIR values raise before output directory creation
  - explicit output_dir behavior remains unchanged and keeps existing public input validation
  - tests verify no fallback artifacts are created for invalid env artifact directories
```

## 3.444 Binance Recv Window Environment Validation Record - 2026-05-13

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

Binance COIN-M signed order and read-only account requests include a
`recvWindow` parameter. The default is environment-backed through
`HALO_SWING_BINANCE_RECV_WINDOW_MS`, but nonpositive values could reach signing
and request construction after all execution/read guards had passed. This slice
validates explicit and settings-backed recvWindow values before signing or any
network attempt.

### B. кө¬нҳ„ кІ°кіј

```text
status: verified
implemented:
  - BinanceOrderIntent.request_params now validates recvWindow as a positive integer before signed order query construction
  - signed_read_query now validates recvWindow as a positive integer before USER_DATA query signing
  - execute_btc_order validates HALO_SWING_BINANCE_RECV_WINDOW_MS-derived settings before signed POST request construction
  - get_binance_coinm_account_snapshot validates HALO_SWING_BINANCE_RECV_WINDOW_MS-derived settings before signed read-only GET request construction
  - valid HALO_SWING_BINANCE_RECV_WINDOW_MS values are preserved in signed order request bodies
  - invalid recvWindow env tests prove no Binance network attempt occurs
```

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

Explicit runtime retention and watchdog inputs already reject nonpositive
values at the public tool boundary. The environment-backed defaults from
`HALO_SWING_RUNTIME_RETENTION_MAX_RECORDS`,
`HALO_SWING_RUNTIME_RETENTION_MAX_BYTES`, `HALO_SWING_RUNTIME_FAILURE_WINDOW`,
and `HALO_SWING_RUNTIME_FAILURE_THRESHOLD` were still silently clamped to 1 when
set to zero or negative numbers. This slice makes malformed env defaults fail
before retention inspection/mutation or watchdog evaluation can proceed.

```text
  - nonpositive HALO_SWING_RUNTIME_FAILURE_WINDOW and HALO_SWING_RUNTIME_FAILURE_THRESHOLD values now raise instead of silently clamping to 1
```

## 3.442 Readiness Environment Boolean Normalization Record - 2026-05-13

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

Readiness payloads already keep Telegram/gateway/live-data env values secret by
returning booleans only. However, the boolean checks used direct env truthiness,
so whitespace or control-character values could mark Telegram or live-data gates
as ready even though the environment was malformed. This slice requires env
values to be nonblank and control-character-free before counting them as
configured, without returning env values or env key names.

```text
  - blank or control-character Telegram/gateway env values no longer make the Telegram gate ready
  - blank or control-character market/macro/news env values no longer make the live_data gate ready
  - readiness coverage verifies malformed env values remain secret-safe and do not expose env key names or env values in payloads
```

values. The default resolver still accepted
`HALO_SWING_BINANCE_CREDENTIALS_PATH` through settings without the same
blank/control-character guard, so invalid env configuration could resolve an
unsafe path or select malformed local credential files before encrypted
credential status reads or writes. This slice hardens the shared credential
path resolver itself.

### B. кө¬нҳ„ кІ°кіј

```text
status: verified
implemented:
  - resolve_credentials_path now trims valid explicit, environment, and settings Binance credential paths before Path construction
  - resolve_credentials_path now treats a present blank HALO_SWING_BINANCE_CREDENTIALS_PATH as invalid instead of resolving an unsafe path
  - resolve_credentials_path now rejects C0 and DEL control characters in HALO_SWING_BINANCE_CREDENTIALS_PATH before encrypted credential reads or writes
  - credential coverage verifies invalid env paths raise before status reads, encrypted credential writes, default fallback, or malformed local file creation
```

## 3.435 Harness Argument DEL Control Validation Record - 2026-05-13

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

The harness already rejected blank values and C0 control characters in
`--input-file` and `--audit-log-path` arguments. ASCII DEL (`0x7f`) is also a
control character, but the harness-specific argument guards did not reject it
while the public tool normalizers did. This slice aligns the harness boundary
with the rest of the validation policy.

### B. кө¬нҳ„ кІ°кіј

```text
status: verified
implemented:
  - harness argument validation now treats ASCII DEL as a control character
  - input-file arguments containing ASCII DEL are rejected before file reads
  - invalid input-file DEL failures write safe failure-audit metadata without serializing raw invalid path text
  - audit-log-path arguments containing ASCII DEL are rejected before audit sink selection
  - invalid audit-log-path DEL failures exit before any requested, fallback, or default audit write
```

with ASCII control characters could be interpreted as requested audit files.

serializing raw invalid path text.

## 3.432 Harness Input Source Conflict Failure Audit Record - 2026-05-12

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

The harness accepts payloads from either `--input-json` or `--input-file`.
Supplying both sources silently preferred the file path and ignored the explicit
JSON payload, which made caller intent ambiguous and could hide invalid or
sensitive JSON text from the public failure boundary. This slice rejects
conflicting input sources before file reads or tool dispatch and records only
safe conflict metadata.

## 3.429 Public Tool Input Boundary Failure Audit Record - 2026-05-12

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

The shared registry now rejects non-object payloads and unexpected input keys
before dispatch. Tools with required public inputs still depended on Python
function-call mechanics when callers omitted a required key, which could surface
raw missing-argument `TypeError` text. This slice makes missing required inputs a
public tool-boundary validation failure with deterministic harness audit output.
It also makes non-object harness `--input-json` and `--input-file` payloads
auditable instead of exiting through unaudited argparse errors.

### B. кө¬нҳ„ кІ°кіј

```text
status: verified
implemented:
  - ToolSpec.call now rejects missing required payload keys before implementation dispatch
  - missing required input messages preserve fixed-signature tool parameter order
  - append_tool_audit_event now accepts non-object input payloads so shape failures can still be audited
  - direct registry coverage verifies create_document_evidence_card missing artifact_ref fails with a public ValueError
  - direct registry coverage verifies save_binance_credentials missing api_key, api_secret, and passphrase fails before credential writes
  - harness coverage verifies create_document_evidence_card missing artifact_ref exits nonzero and emits no stdout payload
  - harness coverage verifies non-object input-json and input-file payloads exit nonzero and preserve raw input in failure audits
  - harness coverage verifies failure audits record original input, resource_id, failure outcome, and public error text without output_summary
```

nonfinite realized-R, negative `age_days_ago`, and nonnumeric component score
values. The harness failure-audit boundary covered the broader provided-signals
input classes but not those remaining representative row-field failures. This
slice closes that CLI/audit matrix and hardens the shared tool registry so
unexpected payload keys fail with public tool names instead of internal Python
`TypeError` text.

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

`evaluate_score_performance(signals=...)`лҠ” Phase 6 н”јл“ңл°ұ нҢҢмқҙн”„лқјмқёмқҳ
кі„мӮ° н•өмӢ¬мқҙлӢӨ. кё°мЎҙ кө¬нҳ„мқҖ `signals or fixture` truthinessлЎң мғҳн”Ңмқ„ м„ нғқн•ҙ
callerк°Җ л№Ҳ лҰ¬мҠӨнҠёлҘј л„ҳкІЁлҸ„ fixture replayлЎң мЎ°мҡ©нһҲ лҢҖмІҙн–ҲлӢӨ. лҳҗн•ң malformed
provided signal rowк°Җ score bin, calibration, attribution, OOS, walk-forward,
overfit math лӮҙл¶Җк№Ңм§Җ л“Өм–ҙк°Ҳ мҲҳ мһҲм—ҲлӢӨ. мқҙлІҲ sliceлҠ” `signals=None`л§Ң fixture
fallbackмңјлЎң мң м§Җн•ҳкі , caller-provided sampleмқҖ лӘ…мӢңм ҒмңјлЎң кІҖмҰқн•ңлӢӨ.

## 3.377 Signal Identity Control Character Input Normalization Record - 2026-05-11

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

`record_signal` and `label_signal_outcome` already rejected blank/non-string
identity values and normalized surrounding whitespace, while ledger paths
already rejected ASCII control characters. However, caller-supplied signal
identity strings such as `signal_id`, `run_id`, `created_at`, `underlying`,
`config_version`, `config_hash`, and label identity fields could still contain
control characters that were stripped before repository writes or label lookup.
This slice rejects ASCII control characters before trim at the recording identity
boundary.

### B. кө¬нҳ„ кІ°кіј

```text
status: verified
implemented:
  - _normalize_optional_string_identity now rejects ASCII control characters before trim
  - record_signal rejects control-character signal.signal_id, signal.run_id, signal.created_at, signal.underlying, signal.config_version, and signal.config_hash before indicator snapshots or ledger writes
  - label_signal_outcome rejects control-character signal_id and invalidating_event_id before ledger lookup, triple-barrier labeling, or label writes
  - direct coverage verifies recording identity failures without ledger file creation for record_signal
  - harness coverage verifies record_signal and label_signal_outcome identity control-character failures exit nonzero and record failure audit events without output_summary
```

## 3.376 Runtime Control Character Input Normalization Record - 2026-05-11

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

`get_runtime_status` and `record_runtime_checkpoint` already normalized runtime
paths and checkpoint `run_id` by trimming caller-supplied strings and rejecting
blank/non-string values. However, trailing control characters could still be
silently stripped before audit reads, ledger repository resolution, retention
inspection/mutation, checkpoint id generation, or checkpoint writes. This slice
rejects ASCII control characters before trim at the runtime public boundary.

```text

implemented:
  - _normalize_optional_path now rejects ASCII control characters before trim
  - _normalize_optional_run_id now rejects ASCII control characters before trim
  - get_runtime_status rejects control-character audit_log_path and ledger_path before audit reads, ledger repository resolution, retention inspection, or retention mutation
  - record_runtime_checkpoint rejects control-character checkpoint_path, audit_log_path, ledger_path, and run_id before runtime status reads, checkpoint_id generation, or checkpoint writes
  - direct coverage verifies runtime path/run_id failures without checkpoint or ledger file creation
  - harness coverage verifies get_runtime_status and record_runtime_checkpoint control-character failures exit nonzero and record failure audit events without output_summary
```

preview, and risk settings tools. However, helper paths still stripped string

## 3.361 Document Evidence Control Character Input Normalization Record - 2026-05-11

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

`create_document_evidence_card` now validates public document evidence text
before trimming, so ASCII control characters such as embedded or trailing
newlines cannot be stripped into accepted evidence fields. This keeps Phase 8
document summary evidence deterministic and auditable before report assembly or
artifact references are trusted.

### B. кө¬нҳ„ кІ°кіј

```text

implemented:
  - _normalize_required_text now rejects ASCII control characters on raw input before trim
  - create_document_evidence_card rejects control characters in summary, artifact_ref, ref_type, modality, evidence_id, category, source, observed_at, bias, buy, sell, invalidating_condition, and asset_scope entries before evidence card construction
  - trailing newlines can no longer be silently stripped into clean document evidence fields
  - direct tool coverage covers summary, artifact_ref, observed_at, and asset_scope control-character inputs
  - report-side drift guard coverage remains preserved through post-construction evidence-card mutation
  - harness coverage verifies newline summary exits nonzero and records a failure audit event without output_summary
```

`create_document_evidence_card` is the public Phase 8 helper that converts
caller-supplied document/PDF summaries into portable evidence cards. The report
side already had extensive drift guards for malformed extra evidence cards, but
the direct helper still transformed several public inputs before validating
their shape. This slice moves text, artifact reference, asset scope, and score
validation to the public boundary so invalid document evidence input fails
before evidence card construction.

```text
  - create_document_evidence_card now rejects non-list asset_scope and non-finite/non-numeric score inputs before score clamping
```

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

`render_chart` writes PNG chart artifacts, and `generate_latest_signal_report`
can request chart rendering through `chart_output_dir`. Symbol, timeframe, and
`include_chart` inputs were already guarded, but explicit chart output paths
still needed public-boundary trim/blank validation before artifact directory
creation. A blank explicit chart path could silently fall back to
`artifacts/charts`, and whitespace-only paths could create confusing local
directories. This slice validates chart output paths before chart rendering or
report chart artifact writes.

```text
  - direct coverage verifies trimmed output_dir/chart_output_dir behavior and blank/non-string failures before artifact writes
  - harness coverage verifies invalid render_chart output_dir and invalid generate_latest_signal_report chart_output_dir exit nonzero and record failure audit events without output_summary
```

## 3.358 Signal Ledger Path Input Normalization Record - 2026-05-11

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

`record_signal`, `label_signal_outcome`, and recorded score-performance
evaluation are public Phase 6 ledger tools. Their signal identity and numeric
inputs were already guarded, but explicit `ledger_path` values still flowed into
the ledger repository factory before trim/blank validation. Because the local
JSONL repository resolver treats falsey paths as default-state fallback, a blank
explicit signal ledger path could silently write to or read from the default
runtime ledger. This slice validates signal ledger path inputs before repository
resolution, writes, labels, or recorded performance reads.

```text
  - evaluate_recorded_score_performance now applies the same ledger_path normalization before recorded ledger evaluation
  - explicit blank signal ledger paths no longer silently fall back to the default runtime state ledger
  - direct coverage verifies trimmed ledger_path behavior for record, duplicate, label, and recorded performance flows plus blank/non-string path failures
```

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

`get_runtime_status` and `record_runtime_checkpoint` are public runtime guard tools
that read or write local JSONL runtime artifacts. Numeric and boolean inputs were
already validated, but explicit path inputs still flowed into `resolve_audit_log_path`,
`get_signal_ledger_repository`, or checkpoint writes without trim/blank validation.
Because several lower-level path resolvers use falsey values to fall back to default
state paths, blank explicit runtime paths could silently inspect or mutate default
runtime artifacts. This slice validates runtime path inputs before reads, retention,
or checkpoint writes.

```text
  - explicit blank runtime paths no longer silently fall back to default runtime state paths
  - runtime status coverage verifies trimmed audit/ledger paths still drive retention and watchdog behavior while blank/non-string path inputs fail at the public boundary
```

## 3.355 Audit Web Local Bind Guard Record - 2026-05-11

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

The audit web viewer is documented and used as a local-only operator surface for
redacted audit events. `trading_admin_web` already rejects non-localhost bind hosts,
but `audit_web` still accepted arbitrary `--host` values before starting

operator audit logs cannot be exposed by an accidental `0.0.0.0` bind.

## 3.354 Audit Web Query Input Normalization Record - 2026-05-11

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

`get_audit_log` already validates public limit/filter inputs before reading the local
audit JSONL. The audit web `/api/events` adapter, however, parsed query strings
directly with `int(...)` and returned default limits for invalid values, while
leaving whitespace-padded filters unnormalized. This made the local web viewer less
strict than the MCP audit tool and could silently change operator intent. This slice
aligns the audit web query boundary with the existing audit tool contract while
preserving the no-network, no-secret audit read surface.

### B. кө¬нҳ„ кІ°кіј

```text
status: verified
implemented:
  - audit web /api/events now validates limit query values as positive integers, trims whitespace, caps the limit at 1000, and rejects invalid values before audit reads
  - audit web optional action/resource_type/resource_id/outcome filters now trim whitespace, treat blank values as absent filters, and reject non-string direct payload values
  - invalid /api/events query values now return HTTP 400 JSON error payloads instead of silently falling back to default limits
  - audit web query coverage verifies trimmed filters, capped limits, blank filter no-op behavior, direct invalid query rejection, and HTTP bad-request behavior
```

### C. кІҪкі„ мЎ°кұҙ

```text
not_added:
  - audit event secret re-exposure
  - credential storage
  - Telegram send
  - live data adapter
  - Binance network call
  - live trading
  - migration or repository persistence
  - scheduler
  - order submission
```

## 3.353 Trading Admin HTTP Input Normalization Record - 2026-05-11

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

Trading admin HTTP endpoints are local-only operator surfaces for credential save,
read-only account snapshot, BTC order preview, and BTC risk settings updates. The
direct MCP tools now validate sensitive strings, numeric fields, and booleans, but
the HTTP adapter still converted several JSON values with `str(...)`, `float(...)`,
`int(...)`, or `bool(...)` before reaching those tool boundaries. That meant a
non-string credential could be saved as text, `"false"` could become a truthy kill
switch value, and `NaN`/`Infinity` numeric strings could pass through adapter parsing
before risk validation. This slice validates the HTTP payload boundary while keeping
the UI form workflow intact.

### B. кө¬нҳ„ кІ°кіј

```text
status: verified
implemented:
  - trading admin credential POST inputs now require nonempty string api_key, api_secret, and passphrase before encrypted credential writes
  - trading admin account snapshot POST preserves the safe missing-passphrase blocked path while rejecting non-string passphrase payloads before credential reads
  - trading admin order preview POST validates side, quantity, and optional position_side as strings before preview evaluation
  - trading admin risk settings POST parses form numeric strings into positive finite numbers or integers, rejects NaN/Infinity/decimal counts, and requires real booleans for emergency_kill_switch_enabled
  - omitted admin risk settings fields remain no-op updates instead of implicitly coercing missing emergency_kill_switch_enabled to false
  - admin endpoint coverage verifies valid form-string risk settings, invalid risk booleans/numerics, invalid credential payloads without file creation, invalid order text payloads, and invalid account passphrase types
```

### C. кІҪкі„ мЎ°кұҙ

```text
not_added:
  - committed credential material
  - credential exposure
  - passphrase persistence
  - broker implementation
  - live data adapter
  - Binance network call
  - live trading
  - migration or repository persistence
  - scheduler
  - order submission
```

### D. к°җмӮ¬ кІҖмҰқ


## 3.352 Binance Credential Input Normalization Record - 2026-05-11

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

`save_binance_credentials`мҷҖ `get_binance_credentials_status`лҠ” к°ҖмһҘ лҜјк°җн•ң Binance API
key/secret/passphraseмҷҖ encrypted credential file pathлҘј лӢӨлЈЁлҠ” кіөк°ң MCP лҸ„кө¬лӢӨ. кё°мЎҙ
м ҖмһҘ кІҪлЎңлҠ” non-string `api_key`к°Җ `AttributeError`лЎң нқҗлҘҙкұ°лӮҳ, whitespace-only
passphraseк°Җ кёёмқҙ мЎ°кұҙл§Ң л§ҢмЎұн•ҳл©ҙ key derivationм—җ мӮ¬мҡ©лҗ  мҲҳ мһҲм—ҲлӢӨ. лҳҗн•ң explicit
`credentials_path`лҠ” trim/blank кІҖмҰқ м—Ҷмқҙ `Path()`лЎң л„ҳм–ҙк°Ҳ мҲҳ мһҲм—ҲлӢӨ. мқҙлІҲ sliceлҠ”
encrypted file read/write л°Ҹ key derivation м „м—җ credential text, passphrase, path мһ…л Ҙмқ„
лӘ…мӢңм ҒмңјлЎң кІҖмҰқн•ңлӢӨ.

### B. кө¬нҳ„ кІ°кіј

```text
status: verified
implemented:
  - save_binance_credentials now validates api_key and api_secret as nonempty strings, trims them before encryption, and uses the normalized api_key for api_key_hint
  - save_binance_credentials and load_binance_credentials now validate passphrase as a nonempty string before key derivation, with save preserving the existing minimum length requirement
  - resolve_credentials_path now trims explicit credentials_path and rejects blank/non-string path values before credential status reads or encrypted file writes
  - decrypted credential payload values are validated as nonempty strings before returning BinanceCredentials
  - direct Binance coverage verifies normalized credential save/load/status behavior and invalid credential/path/passphrase failures without creating files
  - harness coverage verifies invalid save input exits nonzero, emits no stdout payload, records a failure audit event without output_summary, redacts secret inputs and credentials_path, and does not create the target credential file
  - valid harness smokes verify trimmed credential/path input returns the safe projection and get_binance_credentials_status reads the normalized path without exposing raw key, secret, passphrase, salt, or token values
```

```text
  - committed credential material
  - credential exposure
  - passphrase persistence
```

`normalize_binance_coinm_account_snapshot`мқҖ caller-supplied Binance COIN-M balanceмҷҖ
position payloadлҘј BTC-only portfolio summaryлЎң нҲ¬мҳҒн•ҳлҠ” кіөк°ң MCP лҸ„кө¬лӢӨ. кё°мЎҙ кІҪлЎңлҠ”
`balance`/`positions`к°Җ listк°Җ м•„лӢҲкұ°лӮҳ rowк°Җ objectк°Җ м•„лӢҢ кІҪмҡ°м—җлҸ„ TypeErrorлӮҳ л№Ҳ
мҠӨлғ…мғ·мңјлЎң нқҳлҹ¬к°Ҳ мҲҳ мһҲм—Ҳкі , invalid decimal к°’мқҖ `_safe_decimal`мқ„ нҶөн•ҙ 0мңјлЎң мЎ°мҡ©нһҲ
ліҙм •лҗ  мҲҳ мһҲм—ҲлӢӨ. мқҙлІҲ sliceлҠ” read-only portfolio summaryлҘј л§Ңл“Өкё° м „м—җ balance/position
row shape, timestamp metadata, contract size, raw decimal fieldsлҘј лӘ…мӢңм ҒмңјлЎң кІҖмҰқн•ңлӢӨ.

## 3.350 BTC Order Input Normalization Record - 2026-05-11

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

`preview_btc_order`мҷҖ `execute_btc_order`лҠ” BTC COIN-M мЈјл¬ё intentлҘј л°ӣм•„ risk gateмҷҖ
мӢӨн–ү guardлҘј кі„мӮ°н•ҳлҠ” кіөк°ң MCP лҸ„кө¬лӢӨ. кё°мЎҙ `_build_intent`лҠ” `quantity`лҘј `str()`лЎң
мЎ°мҡ©нһҲ ліҖнҷҳн•ҳкі , `reduce_only="false"`лҘј `bool("false") == True`лЎң мІҳлҰ¬н•  мҲҳ мһҲм—ҲлӢӨ.
лҳҗн•ң side/order_type/position_side/time_in_force/client_order_idмқҳ whitespaceмҷҖ нғҖмһ…
мҳӨлҘҳк°Җ intent validation мқҙм „м—җ лӘ…нҷ•нһҲ м •лҰ¬лҗҳм§Җ м•Ҡм•ҳлӢӨ. мқҙлІҲ sliceлҠ” risk кі„мӮ°, credential
read, live submission guard мқҙм „м—җ мЈјл¬ё мһ…л Ҙмқ„ лӘ…мӢңм ҒмңјлЎң м •к·ңнҷ”н•ңлӢӨ.

### B. кө¬нҳ„ кІ°кіј

```text
status: verified
implemented:
  - preview_btc_order and execute_btc_order now normalize side, order_type, quantity, price, time_in_force, position_side, reduce_only, and client_order_id at the shared intent boundary
  - side/order_type/position_side/time_in_force are trimmed and uppercased before validation/request payload projection
  - quantity and price now require nonempty string decimal input and reject NaN/Infinity before notional/risk calculations
  - reduce_only now requires a real boolean, so reduce_only="false" cannot become truthy and change order semantics
  - client_order_id now trims surrounding whitespace and rejects blank/non-string values before request parameter construction
  - direct Binance coverage verifies normalized LIMIT preview output and invalid text/decimal/boolean order input failures
  - harness coverage verifies invalid reduce_only input exits nonzero, emits no stdout payload, and records a failure audit event without output_summary
  - valid harness smoke verifies trimmed/uppercased LIMIT preview output without order submission, credential reads, live data adapters, or network calls
```

`emergency_kill_switch_enabled="false"`к°Җ `bool("false") == True`лЎң м ҖмһҘлҗ  мҲҳ мһҲм—Ҳкі ,
`max_daily_order_count=1.5`лӮҳ `"2"` к°ҷмқҖ к°’мқҙ `int()`лЎң мЎ°мҡ©нһҲ ліҙм •лҗ  мҲҳ мһҲм—ҲлӢӨ.
blank pathлҸ„ м“°кё° м „м—җ лӘ…нҷ•нһҲ кұ°л¶Җлҗҳм§Җ м•Ҡм•ҳлӢӨ. мқҙлІҲ sliceлҠ” risk settings/stateлҘј
мқҪкұ°лӮҳ м“°кё° м „м—җ numeric/bool/path мһ…л Ҙмқ„ лӘ…мӢңм ҒмңјлЎң кІҖмҰқн•ңлӢӨ.

### A. лӘ©м Ғ

`get_integration_readiness`лҠ” Hermes/Telegram м„Өм •, migration/repository мҠ№мқё,
Binance testnet smoke мӨҖл№„, live order мҠ№мқё, live data source кІ°м •мқ„ н•ң payloadм—җм„ң
нҢҗм •н•ҳлҠ” кіөк°ң MCP лҸ„кө¬лӢӨ. кё°мЎҙ кІҪлЎңлҠ” `migration_go_approved="false"` к°ҷмқҖ л¬ёмһҗм—ҙмқҙ
truthy мҠ№мқёмңјлЎң н•ҙм„қлҗ  мҲҳ мһҲм—Ҳкі , `telegram_configured="false"`лӮҳ
`market_data_source_configured="false"`лҸ„ мӨҖл№„ мҷ„лЈҢ evidenceмІҳлҹј нқҳлҹ¬к°Ҳ мҲҳ мһҲм—ҲлӢӨ.
лҳҗн•ң blank path мһ…л ҘмқҖ env/default fallbackмқҙлӮҳ downstream path мІҳлҰ¬лЎң мЎ°мҡ©нһҲ л„ҳм–ҙк°Ҳ мҲҳ
мһҲм—ҲлӢӨ. мқҙлІҲ sliceлҠ” gate evidenceлҘј кі„мӮ°н•ҳкұ°лӮҳ credential/risk fileмқ„ мқҪкё° м „м—җ
bool/path мһ…л Ҙмқ„ лӘ…мӢңм ҒмңјлЎң кІҖмҰқн•ңлӢӨ.
